items.title: Photorealistic Coastal Sports Car
items.description: Generates a high-quality automotive photograph of a sports car parked on a scenic coastal road.
items.prompt: A photorealistic, high-resolution automotive shot of a {argument name="car color" default="bright red"} {argument name="car model" default="Ferrari F8 Tributo"} parked on a {argument name="setting" default="coastal road overlooking the ocean"}. The sports car is positioned at a slight angle, showcasing its sleek aerodynamic curves, aggressive front fascia, distinct LED headlights, and silver alloy wheels with yellow center caps. The iconic yellow shield logo is visible on the front fender. The background features a deep blue sea, a low stone guardrail, and a distant rocky coastline covered in lush green vegetation and scattered buildings under a clear blue sky. The lighting is a {argument name="lighting" default="bright sunny day"}, casting sharp, realistic shadows on the asphalt and creating brilliant reflections on the car's glossy paint.

items.title: Hypercar Parked Before a Historic Landmark
items.description: Generates a photorealistic image of a luxury hypercar parked in front of a famous architectural landmark under soft lighting.
items.prompt: A photorealistic, high-resolution image of a glossy {argument name="car model" default="black Bugatti Chiron"} parked on a cobblestone plaza. The hypercar is positioned at a slight angle, showcasing its sleek aerodynamic curves, distinctive horseshoe front grille, quad LED headlights, black alloy wheels, and bright blue brake calipers. The car's highly reflective paint mirrors the surrounding environment. In the background stands the majestic {argument name="background landmark" default="Notre-Dame de Paris"} cathedral, featuring its intricate Gothic architecture, large rose window, and twin towers. The scene is set during an {argument name="lighting and weather" default="overcast daytime"}, providing soft, diffused natural lighting. A few pedestrians are casually walking in the background, and ornate vintage Parisian street lamps are visible on the right side of the plaza, adding to the European city atmosphere.

items.title: Sports Car and Airliner in Hangar
items.description: Generates a photorealistic image of a sports car parked in front of a commercial airliner inside a reflective hangar.
items.prompt: A photorealistic, high-resolution commercial photograph of a {argument name="car model and color" default="bright blue Alpine A110 R sports car"} parked in the foreground inside a massive aircraft hangar. The car features a black carbon fiber hood, black roof, black alloy wheels, and a front license plate reading "{argument name="license plate text" default="A110 R"}". Directly behind the car, dominating the background, is a {argument name="airplane model" default="white Airbus A320 commercial airliner"} with a blue tail. The hangar has a highly polished, reflective concrete floor that mirrors the car and plane. To the left, a sign on the metal wall reads "{argument name="hangar sign text" default="HANGAR 05 MAINTENANCE"}". The hangar doors are wide open, revealing a bright, overcast sky and a distant cityscape. The lighting is soft and cinematic, highlighting the sleek aerodynamic curves of both vehicles.

items.title: Woman Embracing a Bear in Winter
items.description: Generates a photorealistic, cinematic image of a person affectionately hugging a large wild animal in a snowy setting.
items.prompt: A cinematic, photorealistic shot of a young woman with {argument name="hair style" default="long wavy brown hair with small braids"} wearing {argument name="clothing style" default="rustic, heavy brown historical garments with fur trim and leather pouches"}. She is kneeling in the snow and tenderly hugging a massive, gentle {argument name="animal type" default="brown grizzly bear"}. Both the woman and the bear have their eyes closed in a peaceful, affectionate embrace. The bear rests its large head against her. The setting is a {argument name="environment" default="snowy pine forest"} during winter, with soft, natural daylight. Light snowflakes are dusted across the woman's hair and the bear's thick fur. High detail, 8k resolution, fantasy realism.

items.title: Hand-drawn Chengdu Food Map
items.description: A detailed prompt for a watercolor and colored pencil style illustrated map of Chengdu's famous food locations.
items.prompt: A hand-drawn style city food map with {argument name="city" default="Chengdu"} as the theme. The image is based on a bird's-eye view simplified hand-drawn city map, marking major roads and landmarks with a cute, non-proportional hand-drawn feel. Scattered across the map are 12 exquisite small hand-drawn illustrations of food spots: {argument name="landmark" default="Chunxi Road Chuan Chuan Xiang"} (skewers with various ingredients steaming), Kuanzhai Alley San Da Pao (three glutinous rice balls flying towards a copper plate), Jianshe Road Egg Pancakes (golden and crispy being flipped), Yulin Road Hotpot (nine-grid pot bubbling), etc. Each illustration occupies about 5% of the map area, with the shop name and a recommendation quote "The place with a queue at 2 AM" marked in handwriting next to it. The edges of the map are decorated with hand-drawn vines and chili peppers forming a border. There is a hand-drawn compass and legend in the bottom right corner. The top left title "{argument name="title" default="Chengdu Foodie Trek Map"}" uses chubby, rounded hand-drawn artistic fonts decorated with chili peppers. The overall style is a hand-drawn texture of mixed watercolor and colored pencils, with colors dominated by warm tones (chili red, ginger yellow, emerald green), 1:1 ratio.

items.title: Epic Fantasy Double Exposure Silhouette
items.description: A complex double-exposure illustration forming a man's profile filled with fantasy characters, creatures, and castles.
items.prompt: An {argument name="overall theme" default="epic fantasy"} illustration utilizing a {argument name="art style" default="watercolor and ink wash double exposure"} technique on a vintage parchment background. The overall composition forms the {argument name="main silhouette subject" default="right-facing profile of a man's head"}. Inside this silhouette is a complex montage of scenes and characters. At the top, a white tree with red leaves stands near a cliffside castle, with a white winged creature flying on the left and a black dragon breathing fire on the right. Below this, a blonde woman sits on a throne made of swords, while a cloaked figure stands on a hill nearby. In the center right, a romantic couple consisting of a blonde woman and a dark-haired man in a fur collar gaze at each other. To their left stands a knight in full plate armor holding a sword. Below them is a group of 3 figures: a man, a young woman, and a child. At the bottom, a large white wolf head is on the left, and a stag stands near a castle on the right. In the bottom center, a flaming heart hovers above 2 crossed swords and 1 golden crown. The {argument name="dominant color palette" default="muted earthy tones with splashes of red and orange"} creates a dramatic, legendary atmosphere.

items.title: Song Dynasty Social Media Feed
items.description: A creative prompt that imagines what a social media feed would look like during the Song Dynasty, featuring Su Shi.
items.prompt: "{argument name="title" default="Song Dynasty Social Media Feed"}", a humorous fusion of ancient and modern interface design style. The image simulates a mobile social media interface, but the content is entirely Song Dynasty scenes. The profile picture is a portrait of a Song Dynasty scholar. Username: "{argument name="username" default="Su Shi SuShi_Official"}". Posted content: "Just arrived in Huangzhou; exiled but in a decent mood. Made Dongpo Pork myself today, the taste is amazing. Recipe attached:". The attached picture is a close-up of Dongpo Pork in a traditional fine-brush painting style. Like list: "Huang Tingjian, Qin Guan, Foyin and 126 others". Comment section: "Wang Anshi: Hehe", "Sima Guang: Still that same flavor". Interface elements like the like icon are replaced with Song Dynasty patterns. Status bar shows "Great Song Mobile 5G" and "Third Year of Yuanfeng". The color scheme is a mobile dark mode paired with elegant Song Dynasty tones. A masterpiece of historical and social media collision.

The background is a breathtaking, highly detailed gothic fantasy castle and cityscape at night. Just below the main title, smaller English text reads "{argument name="english subtitle" default="REGALIA OF THE STARBLADE"}". The background shows a dramatic sunset sky with dark clouds, smoke rising from the ruins, flying drones, and a wet, reflective ground. items.description: Generates an anime-style illustration of a cybernetic maid in a sunlit room with customizable typography overlays.
items.prompt: A high-quality anime-style illustration of a beautiful female android maid with {argument name="hair color" default="long white"} hair and striking blue eyes. She wears a highly detailed black and white frilly maid outfit integrated with futuristic white mechanical armor plating on her arms and legs, featuring glowing blue cybernetic accents and joints. On her chest is a small digital screen displaying a glowing blue heartbeat monitor line. She has mechanical headphone-like ears beneath a traditional maid headdress. She is standing in a bright, sunlit modern apartment bedroom with large windows overlooking a futuristic city skyline. The lighting is soft and cinematic, with glowing dust motes in the air. She has a gentle, slightly melancholic expression, with one hand resting softly near her chest screen. The image features elegant typography overlays. At the very top, small delicate text reads "{argument name="top quote" default="感情は、まだうまく名前にできない。"}". At the bottom, large elegant Japanese text reads "{argument name="character name" default="絢瀬アリシア"}", with the English text "{argument name="english name" default="AYASE ALICIA"}" directly below it. Underneath that, smaller text reads "{argument name="bottom description" default="旧式家庭支援アンドロイド、感情学習中。"}". The overall aesthetic is like a sci-fi light novel cover or visual novel key visual.

items.title: Brainrot Lecture Hall Projector
items.description: A photograph of a classroom projector screen displaying a math lecture flanked by two mobile gameplay videos.
items.prompt: A realistic photograph taken from the audience in a dimly lit university lecture hall, looking over the backs of the heads of three students in the foreground towards a large projector screen. The projector screen displays a layout split into three distinct vertical panels. The left panel shows vertical {argument name="left game" default="Subway Surfers gameplay"}, featuring a character running on train tracks collecting gold coins with UI elements like a score of "001022". The wide center panel displays an academic presentation slide titled "{argument name="slide topic" default="9.3: Infinite Geometric Series"}". The slide contains math text: "Example 3: Find the sum of the infinite geometric series. 1/3 - 1/9 + 1/27 - 1/81 + ... Solution: The series is geometric with a = 1/3 and r = -1/3. Since |r| < 1, the infinite geometric series converges. S = a / (1 - r) = (1/3) / (1 - (-1/3)) = (1/3) / (4/3) = 1/4. The sum of the series is 1/4." The slide footer reads "{argument name="professor name" default="Dr. Larson"}", "{argument name="course name" default="Calculus II"}", "11/14/2024", and "7 / 35". The right panel shows vertical {argument name="right game" default="Minecraft parkour gameplay"}, featuring floating wooden blocks over a grassy landscape with a TikTok watermark at the bottom right. The room has a drop ceiling and blackboards visible behind the screen edges.

items.title: Guangzhou City Promotional Poster
items.description: A comprehensive double-exposure prompt for an elegant city poster, combining traditional aesthetics with modern landmarks and complex text layouts.
items.prompt: A {argument name="year" default="2026"} city promotional poster filled with a {argument name="vibe" default="festive New Year"} atmosphere without losing its elegant style. Double exposure, the composition continues the flowing S-shaped sense; in the lower right corner of a pure white textured background, a miniature figure in traditional Chinese costume is waving a long red silk dance ribbon. This red silk dances in the air, not only showing the smooth texture of silk, but also fantastically transforming into a magnificent mountain and river as it floats toward the upper left. In this 'river', a hand-drawn map of Guangzhou with mountains, seas, and rivers is superimposed, featuring national tide style, the scenery is all in sight, magnificent and shocking. Landmarks of Guangzhou (Canton Tower, Zhujiang New Town buildings, Pearl River, ancient buildings in Guangzhou city, cruise ships, Baiyun Mountain). Surrounded by clouds and mist, with a fairy-like atmosphere, rich colors, complex structure, and abundant details, but because of the large area of white space, the picture still looks fresh and refined. The lower left corner is typeset with 'SPRING 2026' and a vertical slogan, the overall meaning being '{argument name="slogan" default="Thousand-year commercial capital, charming Guangzhou"}'. The typography is beautiful, generous, and the handwriting is clear and complete, size 9:16.

items.title: Xianxia Cityscape from God's-Eye View
items.description: Generates a breathtaking, extreme high-angle fantasy cityscape with a lone figure overlooking a sprawling, illuminated ancient metropolis.
items.prompt: An extreme top-down god's-eye perspective looking directly down at a vast, glowing {argument name="city style" default="ancient Chinese city"} extending to the horizon, where the curvature of the planet is visible. In the foreground, a lone {argument name="character type" default="swordsman"} in traditional robes stands on the edge of an ornate, dark-tiled ancient palace roof, looking down. Below lies an endless sea of ancient architecture illuminated by warm glowing lights, bustling streets, and dense crowds. Soft mist and fog layers drift through the sprawling metropolis. Photorealistic fantasy concept art, Chinese Xianxia aesthetics, extreme wide angle, massive depth of field. Grand, lonely, and poetic atmosphere with strong color contrast and a moody {argument name="color palette" default="dark blue and warm gold"} color palette.

items.title: 90s Sci-Fi Cliffhanger Movie Still

items.prompt: A cinematic still from a {argument name="movie era and genre" default="1990s American sci-fi action movie"}. A {argument name="male character description" default="rugged male protagonist with a dirty face and a distressed brown leather jacket"} is {argument name="action" default="desperately dangling from the edge of a rocky cliff"}, gripping the rough stone with both hands. Above him, a {argument name="female character description" default="female-presenting android with pale skin, a sharp black bob haircut, and visible robotic joints on her arms"} is calmly looking down at him, resting her hands on the cliff edge. The background features a {argument name="setting" default="vast, deep canyon with a river winding through it under an overcast, dramatic sky"}. Shot on 35mm film, realistic textures, dramatic cinematic lighting.

items.title: Ishihara Color Blindness Test Plate
items.description: Generates a custom Ishihara color blindness test image with a hidden number and configurable dot colors.
items.prompt: An Ishihara color blindness test plate consisting of a large circular field filled with densely packed dots of varying sizes. The background dots within the circle are shades of {argument name="background colors" default="olive green and yellow"}. Embedded in the center is the number {argument name="hidden number" default="67"}, formed by dots in contrasting shades of {argument name="number colors" default="muted red and coral"}. The area outside the main circle is filled with darker, muted brownish-green dots, creating a seamless pointillism texture typical of medical optical illusions.

items.title: 3D Animated Animal Office Encounter

The fox is smirking with one hand in his pocket, wearing a {argument name="fox outfit" default="teal open shirt over a white t-shirt, white pants, and a gold chain"}. They are standing in a modern, upscale office lobby. On the left wall, a metallic 3D star logo reads "{argument name="company name" default="Paw Star ENTERTAINMENT"}" above a sleek reception desk. The background features a black leather sofa, a potted plant, and wall decor including {argument name="background decor" default="3 framed gold records and 2 framed posters featuring the fox"}. The image features detailed fur textures, realistic clothing materials, and soft, professional studio lighting typical of modern animated feature films.

items.title: Professional Cookbook Layout Generator
items.description: A workflow prompt for GPT-Image-2 that converts informal handwritten recipes into a professional, magazine-style cookbook layout with step-by-step imagery and nutritional breakdowns.
items.prompt: Handwritten Recipe → {argument name="output format" default="Professional Cookbook Page"} Upload a messy handwritten {argument name="recipe source" default="family recipe"}; the model searches for accurate modern measurements/nutrition, then generates a {argument name="visual style" default="polished, magazine-style"} double-page spread with step-by-step flat lays, perfect ingredient labels, and calorie breakdowns.

items.title: Graffiti Sketch Style AI Builder
items.description: A detailed prompt for creating stylized graffiti-style sketches of subjects, focusing on expressive lines and rough color blocks with a personalized signature.
items.prompt: Express {argument name="subject" default="a powerful AI builder"} in a graffiti sketch style, presenting an overall visual effect of quick outlines, free deformation, improvised hand-drawing, and draft-like sketches. The lines are casual, exaggerated, varying in thickness, and slightly messy but rhythmic and expressive, emphasizing generalization, exaggeration, fun, and spontaneity rather than rigorous realism or fine detail. The colors are expressed in rough blocks with a distinct dry-brush feel, retaining uneven smears, brush marks, fly-white, and layering. Colors automatically adapt to the {argument name="theme" default="powerful AI builder"}, but the overall expression remains graffiti-like, sketch-like, and generalized. No transparent watercolor smudging effects, no delicate watercolor transitions, no paper textures, no soft atomization, and no dreamy textures. The background is mainly white space, maintaining a sense of simplicity, ease, unfinishedness, and design. Small amounts of auxiliary symbols, arrows, marks, circles, repeated lines, handwritten text, or other graffiti elements can be added to enhance the sketchbook or essay-like visual language, but they should not be too crowded or destroy the subject and the white space atmosphere. The content of the picture does not need to be written in advance; {argument name="character image" default="a powerful AI builder"} will automatically deduce and generate the most suitable main image, actions, related elements, symbols, or simplified scenes. The overall style remains a unified graffiti sketch style and an exaggerated, generalized expression, avoiding complex realistic backgrounds and excessive detail. A special signature 'BlanPlan' should be naturally added as part of the picture, in a low-key but clear position such as the bottom left, bottom right, or near the title. The style should be unified with the overall layout, like an artist's signature or a design mark; the signature font should be exquisite, restrained, and high-end, not too large, and should not destroy the main composition or appear abrupt or cheap.

items.title: Watercolor Double-Exposure Fantasy Silhouette
items.description: Generates a dreamy watercolor illustration featuring a character's profile silhouette filled with a detailed, layered fantasy scene.
items.prompt: A dreamy watercolor double-exposure illustration where the main shape is the side profile silhouette of a {argument name="main subject silhouette" default="young anime girl facing left"}. Inside her silhouette is a rich, layered fantasy world. At the top is a {argument name="top scenery" default="grand white castle with multiple spires under a starry night sky with a crescent moon"}. Below the castle, two cloaked figures stand in a mystical forest. In the center, a {argument name="central character" default="young female mage with pink hair holding a glowing magical staff"} stands prominently. To the left of the mage, a white horse is visible. At the bottom of the silhouette is a {argument name="bottom scenery" default="fantasy village surrounded by blooming cherry blossom trees, with a large open spellbook and a sword resting in the foreground"}. The artwork features a {argument name="color palette" default="soft pastel purples, pinks, and blues"} color palette. The background outside the silhouette is textured parchment with soft watercolor splatters and fading cherry blossom petals, with the signature "tamanyo" written in cursive at the bottom left.

items.title: Idyllic Alpine Lake Village Landscape
items.description: Generates a highly detailed, picturesque landscape of a mountain lake village with customizable foreground and background elements.
items.prompt: A breathtaking, hyper-realistic landscape of an {argument name="setting" default="alpine lake village"}. In the foreground, a {argument name="foreground element" default="wooden pier with 1 empty bench"} extends into the crystal-clear blue water from the bottom left, framed by vibrant {argument name="flower color" default="bright pink and red"} flowers on the left and tall green reeds on the right. The calm lake perfectly reflects the scenery and features exactly 1 small red rowboat floating on the left and 1 white sailboat on the right. On the right shoreline, a picturesque European village with 1 prominent pointed church spire and traditional houses is nestled at the base of lush green hills. Towering {argument name="mountain type" default="snow-capped jagged peaks"} dominate the background under a {argument name="weather" default="bright sunny day with fluffy white clouds"}. The lighting is vibrant, idyllic, and highly detailed.

items.title: Messy Handwritten Notebook Photo

items.prompt:
Create a hyper-realistic phone-shot image of a notebook page with messy, bad handwriting. The notebook is lying on a wooden table. Part of the page is darker because of the shadow of the person and phone taking the picture. The photo looks casually taken, with slight motion blur from camera movement, so the handwriting is somewhat blurry and not very easy to read. The notebook also has lines.

The handwritten text on the page is a {argument name="content" default="story-oriented review of Nineteen Eighty-Four"}.

She has pale skin, pointed elf ears adorned with red drop earrings, and a calm, neutral expression as she looks slightly upward. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="white capelet with gold trim and red gems over a black and white striped shirt"}. The scene is set outdoors during the daytime with beautiful dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy of a large tree on the right, casting soft shadows on her face and clothes. She stands on a cobblestone path lined with green grass and small white flowers. To her left is a rustic wooden signpost with three directional planks bearing the text {argument name="signpost text top" default="北側諸国"}, {argument name="signpost text middle" default="グラナト山"}, and {argument name="signpost text bottom" default="オイサースト"}. items.title: Mecha Ink Wash Landscape Painting
items.description: Generates a traditional Chinese landscape painting featuring a giant mecha seamlessly blended into misty mountains and ink washes.
items.prompt: A traditional Chinese ink wash landscape painting featuring a giant mecha integrated into the misty mountains. The mecha, resembling {argument name="mecha type" default="Evangelion Unit-01"}, features a purple and green color scheme with a prominent horn and the number "01" on its shoulder. Its massive form dissolves into expressive, dripping black ink washes, seamlessly blending into the rocky mountain formations. The surrounding landscape includes steep, jagged peaks painted with teal and green washes, cascading waterfalls, ancient pine trees, and small traditional pavilions perched on the cliffs. A flock of birds flies through the dense fog filling the valleys. In the top left corner, vertical traditional Chinese calligraphy reads {argument name="main text" default="初號機"} followed by {argument name="sub text" default="人之造物 亦為山水"}, accompanied by a red artist seal stamp. Another red seal is stamped in the bottom right corner. The entire artwork is rendered on textured, aged rice paper, utilizing dynamic brushstrokes and atmospheric perspective typical of classical Shan shui art.

items.description: Generates a photorealistic image of aged paper featuring handwritten Chinese calligraphy alongside an integrated traditional ink wash painting.
items.prompt: A photograph of a piece of aged, slightly textured paper featuring traditional Chinese calligraphy and an ink wash painting. The upper and left portions of the paper are filled with handwritten Chinese text in elegant running script, with the centered title "{argument name="title text" default="赤壁赋"}" and the author "{argument name="author name" default="苏轼"}" written next to it. The text flows across multiple lines, resembling a classical poem. Integrated into the bottom right section of the paper is a traditional Chinese ink wash painting depicting {argument name="painting subject" default="a serene nighttime river scene with craggy, misty mountains"}. A single pale full moon hangs in the sky, casting a shimmering reflection on the rippling water below. In the foreground, there is {argument name="boat details" default="a small wooden boat with a woven canopy carrying 2 figures in traditional robes"}. A single square red seal stamp is stamped in the extreme bottom right corner. The image has a warm, historical aesthetic, capturing the authentic look of ink on traditional rice paper.

items.title: Romantic Voxel Dinner Date
items.description: Generates a humorous, first-person perspective of a romantic dinner date with a blocky video game character.
items.prompt: A first-person POV shot of a romantic dinner date with a {argument name="character" default="Minecraft Creeper"}. The scene is set in a {argument name="setting" default="romantic dimly lit restaurant"} with warm ambient lighting and a blurred background showing other tables and a window looking out into the night. The character is sitting directly across the table. Around its head are 7 {argument name="atmosphere effect" default="floating 8-bit red hearts"}. On the wooden table between the viewer and the character, there is a red and white checkered placemat. On it sits a voxel-style plate containing a {argument name="food" default="blocky steak with red and green garnish"}. To the left is a blocky, transparent wine glass filled with red wine. To the right is a blocky red rose in a transparent blocky vase. There are 2 glowing blocky candles in wooden holders on the table. The foreground shows the blurred edge of the viewer's own matching plate of food. The entire image blends realistic cinematic lighting and depth of field with voxel-based, 3D pixel-art objects.

items.title: Voxel Art Bilingual Breakfast Vocabulary Poster
items.description: Generates a 3D voxel-style educational poster featuring a breakfast spread with 15 detailed English-Chinese vocabulary labels and phonetic spellings.
items.prompt:
{
  "type": "educational vocabulary poster",
  "style": "{argument name=\"art style\" default=\"isometric voxel 3D pixel art, Minecraft aesthetic, vibrant colors\"}",
  "scene": "Blocky room with a large wooden table covered in a blue and white checkered tablecloth. A window on the left shows a blocky sunrise landscape. A wooden cabinet, bookshelf, and wall clock are in the background.",
  "characters": [
    "{argument name=\"main character\" default=\"blocky girl with brown pigtails in a pink shirt\"} sitting at the center of the table holding a fork.",
    "A smaller version of the girl at the bottom right, happily eating a slice of watermelon."
  ],
  "layout": {
    "title_sign": "Wooden block board at top left reading '{argument name=\"poster title\" default=\"My Colourful Breakfast\"}'",
    "speech_bubble": "Pointing to the center girl, reading '{argument name=\"speech text\" default=\"Yummy!\"}'",
    "vocabulary_cards_count": 15,
    "vocabulary_cards": [
      { "item": "wall clock", "label": "time /taɪm/ 时间" },
      { "item": "center girl", "label": "breakfast /brekfəst/ 早餐, 早饭" },
      { "item": "sliced bread", "label": "bread /bred/ 面包" },
      { "item": "fried egg", "label": "egg /eg/ (作食物用的) 蛋, 鸡蛋" },
      { "item": "milk carton and glass", "label": "milk /mɪlk/ (牛式羊等的) 奶" },
      { "item": "bowl of noodles", "label": "noodle /'nu:dl/ (常用复数) 面条" },
      { "item": "glass of orange juice", "label": "juice /dʒu:s/ 果汁" },
      { "item": "bowl of white rice", "label": "rice /raɪs/ 大米" },
      { "item": "plate of meat cubes", "label": "meat /mi:t/ 肉" },
      { "item": "plate of broccoli and carrots", "label": "vegetable /vedʒtəbl/ 蔬菜" },
      { "item": "large green leaf", "label": "healthy /helθi/ 健康的" },
      { "item": "empty plate", "label": "plate /pleɪt/ 盘子" },
      { "item": "plate of mixed fruit", "label": "fruit /fru:t/ 水果" },
      { "item": "bowl of candies", "label": "candy /kændi/ 糖果" },
      { "item": "girl eating watermelon", "label": "yummy /jʌmi/ 很好吃的" }
    ]
  }
}

items.title: Cinematic Anime Train Station Poster
items.description: Generates a highly detailed, cinematic anime-style movie poster featuring a character at a twilight train station with customizable typography.
items.prompt: A cinematic anime-style movie poster featuring an {argument name="character description" default="anime girl with short blue hair, blue cat ears, and a fluffy blue cat tail, wearing an oversized white t-shirt"}. She is standing on a wet, reflective outdoor train station platform at twilight, looking back over her shoulder with a gentle, melancholic expression. The background features a beautifully detailed sky transitioning from deep blue to orange and pink, with scattered clouds and early stars. To the left is an illuminated vending machine and an overhead electronic sign displaying Japanese text about the terminal station. To the right, train tracks curve away into the distance alongside rusty metal railings and a convex mirror. The lighting is atmospheric and nostalgic. At the top center, small elegant Japanese text reads "{argument name="top tagline" default="終点のひとつ手前で、ソーダさんはいつも笑う。"}". At the bottom, large elegant Japanese typography displays the main title "{argument name="main title text" default="終点からソーダさん"}", with the English subtitle "{argument name="english subtitle" default="FROM THE TERMINAL, SODA-SAN"}" just below it. At the very bottom edge, small Japanese text reads "{argument name="bottom tagline" default="たぶん恋ではなく、もう少し炭酸だった。"}".

Add ornate gold and pearl hair accessories and long pointed nail guards. Apply an {argument name="lighting and atmosphere" default="ethereal, magical purple-tinted moonlight"} effect.

items.title: Toddler Daily Routine Flashcard Grid
items.description: Generates a 10-panel educational grid illustrating a toddler's daily routine with actions and interactive questions.
items.prompt:
{
  "type": "educational flashcard grid",
  "theme": "{argument name=\"theme\" default=\"toddler daily routine\"}",
  "art_style": "{argument name=\"art style\" default=\"flat vector illustration, soft pastel colors, children's book style\"}",
  "character": "{argument name=\"character description\" default=\"cute toddler girl with short brown hair tied in two small pigtails, rosy cheeks, dot eyes\"}",
  "layout": {
    "grid": "2 rows by 5 columns",
    "total_panels": 10,
    "panel_structure": {
      "top_left": "number in a colored circle",
      "top_center": "action title in bold text",
      "center": "illustration of the character performing the action",
      "bottom": "colored pill-shaped box containing a magnifying glass icon and a question"
    }
  },
  "panels": [
    { "number": 1, "title": "小宝宝起床啦", "illustration": "waking up in bed, stretching arms, sun shining, teddy bear", "bottom_question": "宝宝在哪里？" },
    { "number": 2, "title": "宝宝在刷牙", "illustration": "brushing teeth, wearing blue pajamas, holding a yellow cup", "bottom_question": "牙刷在哪里？" },
    { "number": 3, "title": "宝宝吃早餐", "illustration": "eating toast, glass of milk, fried egg, strawberries on table", "bottom_question": "宝宝在吃什么？" },
    { "number": 4, "title": "宝宝要出门啦", "illustration": "wearing yellow jacket and red backpack, waving goodbye at an open door", "bottom_question": "门在哪里？" },
    { "number": 5, "title": "宝宝在玩球", "illustration": "running on grass, kicking a colorful striped ball, yellow butterfly", "bottom_question": "球在哪里？" },
    { "number": 6, "title": "宝宝在喝水", "illustration": "drinking from a sippy cup, wearing green pajamas", "bottom_question": "杯子在哪里？" },
    { "number": 7, "title": "宝宝吃饭啦", "illustration": "eating rice with a spoon, wearing a cherry bib, food tray with broccoli and carrots", "bottom_question": "勺子在哪里？" },
    { "number": 8, "title": "宝宝在洗澡", "illustration": "taking a bath in a tub full of bubbles, showerhead running, yellow rubber duck", "bottom_question": "泡泡在哪里？" },
    { "number": 9, "title": "宝宝在看书", "illustration": "sitting on a yellow beanbag chair, reading a blue book with a bunny cover, bookshelf in background", "bottom_question": "书在哪里？" },
    { "number": 10, "title": "宝宝睡觉啦", "illustration": "sleeping peacefully in bed under a blue starry blanket, teddy bear, window showing night sky with crescent moon", "bottom_question": "宝宝闭眼了吗？" }
  ]
}

items.title: Exact Image Replication
items.description: Instructs the model to create a 1:1 photorealistic clone of the provided reference image without altering the composition, subjects, or lighting.
items.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0, generate an {argument name="reproduction style" default="exact photorealistic replica"} of the entire scene. Preserve the composition completely unchanged, including the central young woman with long dark hair holding a white jacket and pink phone, the 2 foreground passengers obscuring the view, the subway car interior, the 3 green hanging handles, and the digital display board. Maintain the exact same lighting, colors, and perspective to make it indistinguishable from the original photograph.

items.title: Sci-Fi Chibi Robot Welding in Space

The robot has a large round head with {argument name="eye color" default="glowing blue"} eyes and a white and black mechanical body. It is holding a tool that emits bright orange sparks against the framework. The megastructure is enormous, curving through the scene, built as a {argument name="structure type" default="dark metal lattice covered in thousands of tiny glowing yellow lights"}. In the background, a {argument name="star color" default="brilliant glowing blue"} star shines brightly against a deep space backdrop filled with stars and cosmic dust. The image features hyper-detailed textures, cinematic lighting, high contrast, and a dense, intricate mechanical design.

She has {argument name="hair color" default="vibrant short red"} hair styled in a bob with bangs and is wearing an elaborate fantasy warrior costume featuring a {argument name="costume color" default="glossy red"} and gold tiered mini skirt, a white corset top with black lace and red lacing, matching glossy arm guards, and thigh-high boots. She is looking down with a focused expression, using her right hand to adjust the arm guard on her left arm. A large, ornate {argument name="prop" default="fantasy sword with a blue blade and gold hilt"} leans against the edge of the counter. The background shows a brightly lit vanity mirror with round bulbs reflecting a clothing rack, capturing a candid, slightly over-sharpened, and highly textured photographic style.

items.prompt: A vibrant, cute 3D claymation-style illustration of a retro yellow desktop computer setup on a desk. The central yellow CRT monitor displays a teal screen with the {argument name="OS logo text" default="Microsoft Windows 98"} logo and 7 desktop icons labeled 'My Computer', 'Online Services', 'My Documents', 'Outlook Express', 'Internet Explorer', 'Connect to the Internet', and 'Recycle Bin', plus a bottom taskbar with a 'Start' button and a clock reading '5:49 PM'. The monitor has a yellow sticky note reading '{argument name="monitor sticky note" default="Be Happy"}' and a small yellow bird perched on top. The computer base is labeled 'CREATIVE PC'. In front is a yellow mechanical keyboard labeled 'KBD-98' with orange and cream keys, and a yellow mouse labeled 'MS'. To the left is a green desk lamp, a smiling potted cactus, a blue floppy disk labeled '{argument name="floppy disk label" default="FUN STUFF"}', and a blue mug reading '{argument name="mug text" default="COFFEE TIME!"}' with a smiley face. To the right are 2 stacked books (green 'WINDOWS 98 MANUAL', blue 'INTERNET EXPLORER') and 2 smiling balloons (orange and yellow). The foreground features a green cutting mat, a yellow pencil, a green tape dispenser labeled 'TAPE IT!', 2 crayons, a pink sticky note reading 'Take a Break!', and a white notepad with a 5-item 'TO DO LIST': '1. Be Awesome', '2. Play More', '3. Call Mom', '4. Eat Snacks', '5. Smile :)'. The background wall has a green and cream clock, a white poster reading '{argument name="poster text" default="HAVE A NICE DAY!"}' with a smiling sun and 'Do Your Best!', and 3 additional sticky notes: a yellow one reading 'Dream Big Work Hard!', a pink one reading 'You've Got This!', and a green one reading 'Meeting 10:00 AM!'.

items.title: 3D Realistic X Profile Interface
items.description: A detailed prompt for generating a hyper-realistic 3D social media profile interface based on a reference screenshot with specific character expressions.
items.prompt: Based on the uploaded screenshot of my X profile, generate a {argument name="style" default="hyper-realistic"} 3D Twitter/X profile interface illustration, slightly tilted, with a clean and simple background in minimalist grey. The original avatar remains unchanged. The profile interface perfectly matches a real X screenshot. At the right edge of the screen, based on the person in the uploaded avatar, he is breaking through torn paper. His facial features are identical (no changes to the face), but he now has a natural radiant smile, expressive eyes, and softly glowing skin. He is holding the torn edges of the paper, creating a dynamic 3D effect. Paper fragments are flying, creating a realistic illusion of breaking through. The lighting is soft studio lighting with cinematic shadows and depth of field. Ultra-detailed, 4K, a blend of realistic and Pixar styles, sharp focus. Important notes: - Do not change the avatar (DP) - Maintain the exact same X interface layout and text style - Maintain their original identity - Only enhance the expression to a natural smile - Aspect ratio {argument name="ratio" default="9:16"}

items.prompt: An anime light novel cover. Top left features a stylized Japanese title {argument name="main title" default="黒焔の魔眼使いは、追放先の学園都市で三人の最強ヒロインに溺愛される"} and English subtitle {argument name="english subtitle" default="The Exiled Black-Flame Eye in Arcane Metropolis"}. A vertical Japanese blurb on the right reads {argument name="vertical blurb" default="追放されたはずの俺が、なぜか最強美少女たちの運命そのものになっていた。"}. The scene includes 4 characters and 1 creature. Centered is a male protagonist with {argument name="protagonist hair color" default="black"} hair, a glowing red eye, and a dark coat. He is surrounded by 3 heroines: a top-right girl with long {argument name="heroine hair color" default="silver"} hair and a white-blue crystal dress; a mid-left blonde girl with a side ponytail casting a pink magic circle; and a bottom-right girl with short magenta hair holding a grimoire. A black-and-white wolf familiar sits bottom-left. The background is a dark gothic academy at night, filled with floating pink petals, glowing magic particles, shattered glass, and a faint demonic figure top-right.

items.description: A complex prompt to generate a 3D effect where a character breaks out of their social media profile screen, maintaining specific UI details and character features.

The profile interface is identical to Image 2, with the username '{argument name="username" default="Aigirl"}', a verification badge, a detailed bio, follower count, and a tweet column. On the right side of the screen, a {argument name="character description" default="Image 1"}. Her features are the same as the original (no changes to the face), but she now has a bright, natural smile, lively eyes, and soft, translucent skin. Half of her body is breaking free from the screen, jumping out with a dynamic 3D effect. The ripples caused by breaking free from the screen are shaking violently. The lighting uses soft studio lighting with cinematic shadows and depth of field. Ultra-fine 4K resolution, a blend of realistic imagery and Pixar style, clear and sharp, popular on ArtStation. Important notes: - Do not change the avatar (DP) - Keep the X interface layout and text style unchanged - Retain the girl's original facial features - Only adjust the expression to a natural smile

items.title: Post-Apocalyptic Tactical Anime Girl
items.description: Generates an anime-style illustration of a schoolgirl with tactical gear in a vibrant, rusted post-apocalyptic wasteland.
items.prompt: A high-quality anime illustration of a young girl with {argument name="character hair" default="short brown hair with cat ears"} and blue eyes standing in a {argument name="setting" default="post-apocalyptic wasteland"}. She is wearing a {argument name="character outfit" default="white short-sleeve shirt, blue plaid pleated skirt, black thigh-high socks with white stripes, and a heavy tactical chest rig"}, equipped with a backpack, a wrist-mounted retro-futuristic computer device, and a katana strapped to her waist. The background features a bright blue sky with scattered white clouds. To her right is a heavily rusted brick building with a large, weathered red sign on the roof partially reading "{argument name="sign text" default="RED R"}" alongside a red rocket sculpture. In the foreground, there is a rusted bright blue metal container cart, and to the left, a dilapidated, rusted blue car sits among dry, overgrown weeds and debris. The scene combines vibrant anime character design with detailed, realistic textures of rust and decay.

items.title: Skincare Beauty Campaign Advertisement
items.description: Generates a high-end commercial beauty portrait featuring a model, a skincare product bottle, and elegant promotional typography.
items.prompt: A high-end beauty commercial photograph featuring a close-up of a young East Asian woman with flawless, dewy glass skin. She rests her face gently against her hands and bare arms on a pristine white surface, looking directly at the camera with a soft, serene expression. Her dark hair is loosely pulled back with delicate strands framing her face. In the foreground sits a frosted glass serum bottle with a silver pump, displaying the text "{argument name="brand name" default="LUVIN"}" and "{argument name="product name" default="CALMING MOISTURE SERUM"}". The background is a soft, bright off-white studio setting. Elegant Korean typography is arranged on the left side, featuring the large main headline "{argument name="main headline" default="오늘, 피부는 스스로 빛난다"}". Smaller supporting text above reads "자연에서 찾은 피부의 균형", and text below reads "루빈 카밍 모이스처 세럼" and "민감해진 피부에 전하는 부드럽고 깊은 보습". The brand name "{argument name="brand name" default="LUVIN"}" appears again in the bottom left corner. A tiny drop of clear serum rests on the surface near the bottom left. The lighting is soft, diffused, and luminous, emphasizing a clean, minimalist skincare aesthetic.

He is smiling gently at the camera and holding up a clear plastic water bottle with condensation and a blue label that reads "{argument name="product name" default="POCARI SWEAT"}". The background is a soft-focus, airy room with light blue walls, framed pictures, a warm lamp, and a bright blue sky visible through a window on the left. In the bottom left corner, there is white overlay text that reads "{argument name="overlay text line 1" default="포카리 스웨트"}" above a second line reading "{argument name="overlay text line 2" default="이온을 채워, 순간을 살아"}", underlined by a dynamic white swoosh graphic. The lighting is soft, natural, and inviting, emphasizing a clean and hydrating aesthetic.

On the left side of the frame, a {argument name="celestial body left" default="massive, highly detailed crescent Moon"} dominates the view, showcasing intricate craters and rugged terrain illuminated by harsh sunlight. On the right side, a smaller {argument name="celestial body right" default="crescent Earth"} glows with blue oceans and white atmospheric clouds. In the immediate foreground on the far left, an {argument name="foreground element" default="astronaut's arm wearing a dark blue spacesuit"} is visible, featuring a prominent {argument name="patch logo" default="NASA"} patch on the shoulder. The astronaut is holding a digital tablet with a glowing blue, complex user interface. The edge of the spacecraft window frames the scene, with subtle lens flares and reflections on the glass adding to the immersive, sci-fi documentary aesthetic. High contrast, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution.

items.prompt: A highly realistic video game screenshot in the style of a {argument name="game style" default="Western open-world game"}. Third-person over-the-shoulder view of a rugged cowboy walking away from the camera, wearing a weathered brown jacket, dark pants, a gun holster, and a classic cowboy hat. To his left is a saddled {argument name="horse type" default="dark horse with white spots"}. The setting is a {argument name="environment" default="dusty desert landscape with dry tall grass, dirt trails, cacti, and towering red rock mesas"} during a {argument name="time of day" default="vibrant golden hour sunset"}. In the hazy background, two distant silhouetted figures stand on the dirt path. The image features a video game HUD overlay: in the bottom left corner, a circular minimap with a player arrow and two red blips; in the bottom right corner, three lines of white text with button prompt icons reading 'DRAW WEAPON [RT]', 'HORSE CARGO [Cross D-pad]', and 'TENNESSEE WALKER [LT]'.

items.title: Anime Mirror Reflection of Younger Self
items.description: Generates a moody anime illustration of a character looking into a mirror that reflects a younger version of themselves, complete with customizable atmospheric text.
items.prompt: A cinematic anime illustration of a mature woman looking into a dark mirror, but her reflection shows her as a young child. The foreground features the tall, mature woman seen from behind in a three-quarter view, with long straight {argument name="hair color" default="blonde"} hair, pale skin, and wearing a dark dress adorned with black feather-like accents on the shoulders. She is reaching out to touch the mirror with her right hand. The mirror reflects a young child version of herself with {argument name="eye color" default="golden"} eyes, slightly pointed ears, and a simple white dress with red ribbon bows. The child's hand is pressed against the glass, perfectly aligning with the older woman's hand. The scene has dark, moody, cinematic lighting with a muted, almost sepia-toned color palette, creating high contrast between the pale skin and the dark background. Vertical Japanese text is placed on the left reading {argument name="left text" default="吸血鬼の始祖 怪異の王 キスショット・アセロラオリオン・ハートアンダーブレード"} and on the right reading {argument name="right text" default="私は・私の中にいる もう一人の私"}.

She has messy {argument name="hair color" default="blue"} hair with an ahoge, and bright blue eyes. She is {argument name="expression" default="smiling happily with a slight blush"} and {argument name="pose" default="holding up both hands in peace signs"}. items.title: Magical Glowing Ribbon Style Transformation
items.description: Transforms a standard anime illustration into a highly dynamic, glowing magical scene with swirling energy ribbons and intense lighting.
items.prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the scene by applying an intensely glowing, {argument name="lighting color" default="golden and orange"} lighting effect. Add dynamic, swirling {argument name="magical element" default="luminous ribbons and energy trails"} wrapping around the character and flowing through the foreground and background. Make the character's hair blow dynamically in the wind and fill the air with sparkling light particles. Preserve the original character design, pose, and lantern street setting, but elevate the overall look to a {argument name="aesthetic style" default="radiant, magical anime"} aesthetic.

items.title: Dark Silhouette & Fog Style Transfer
items.description: Transforms a bright reference image into a dark, moody, and foggy silhouette scene with a monochromatic color palette while preserving the original composition.
items.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0, transform the image into a {argument name="atmosphere" default="dark, moody, and foggy"} night scene. Apply a {argument name="color palette" default="monochromatic dark blue and grey"} color grading. Render the main character, lanterns, and foreground elements as {argument name="lighting style" default="dark silhouettes"} against the misty background. Preserve the exact original composition, character pose, and background architecture.

items.title: Pastel Pink and Silver Ornate Style Transfer
items.description: Transforms a reference image into a highly detailed, ethereal fantasy aesthetic with a pastel pink, white, and silver color palette.
items.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0, transform the image's aesthetic to a highly detailed, ornate fantasy style. Change the entire color palette from warm reds and blacks to {argument name="color palette" default="pastel pink, white, and silver"}. Convert the character's dark clothing into a lavish white garment featuring {argument name="clothing details" default="pink floral embroidery and heavy silver filigree"}. Replace her hair accessories with elaborate pink roses, white pearls, and silver ornaments. In the background, transform the 3 prominent hanging lanterns into {argument name="lantern style" default="white and pink ornate lanterns with tassels"}. Cover the surrounding street and buildings with {argument name="environment details" default="white and pink blossoms and intricate silver architectural elements"}. Adjust the lighting to a {argument name="lighting" default="bright, soft, ethereal daylight"}. Preserve the character's original pose, facial expression, and the overall structural composition of the scene.

The man on the left has grey hair and a mustache, smiling enthusiastically, holding one glass of dark soda with a Pepsi logo. The man on the right has short hair and round glasses, looking forward with a subtle smile, holding one glass of dark soda with a Coca-Cola logo. Between them is one large, steaming dark ceramic pot filled with {argument name="dish description" default="braised green beans and pork belly"}. On the table in the front left is one blue Pepsi can, and on the front right is one red Coca-Cola can. The poster features elegant, bold Chinese typography. At the top, a collaboration logo of Pepsi and Coca-Cola sits above the main headline {argument name="main headline" default="炖豆角 可乐"}. Vertical text on the left reads {argument name="left character text" default="赵本山 饰 马大帅 倾情代言"}. Vertical text on the right reads {argument name="right character text" default="范伟 饰 彪哥 倾情代言"}. At the bottom center, an ornate badge contains the tagline {argument name="bottom tagline" default="东北硬菜 遇见经典"}, with smaller fine print below it. The lighting is dramatic, highlighting the steam rising from the food and the condensation on the cold drinks.

items.title: Hypercar Parked Before a Historic Landmark
items.description: Generates a photorealistic automotive image of a luxury car parked in front of a famous architectural landmark, ideal for car enthusiasts and architectural showcases.
items.prompt: A photorealistic automotive shot of a sleek, glossy black {argument name="car model" default="Bugatti Chiron"} parked on a cobblestone plaza. The hypercar features its signature horseshoe grille with a red emblem, illuminated quad rectangular LED headlights, black alloy wheels, and striking {argument name="brake caliper color" default="blue"} brake calipers. Its highly reflective surface mirrors the surroundings. In the background stands the majestic {argument name="landmark" default="Notre-Dame Cathedral"} in Paris, showcasing its intricate Gothic architecture, twin towers, central rose window, and arched entryways. Classic Parisian apartment buildings are visible to the left, and ornate vintage street lamps line the right side. A few pedestrians stroll in the distance under an {argument name="weather/sky" default="overcast"} sky. The image is captured from a slightly low angle to emphasize the car's aggressive, aerodynamic stance.

items.title: Sports Car and Airliner in Hangar
items.description: Generates a photorealistic image of a sports car parked in front of a commercial airliner inside a maintenance hangar.
items.prompt: A photorealistic, highly detailed image of a {argument name="car description" default="blue Alpine A110 R sports car with a black hood"} parked in the foreground inside a large, spacious aircraft hangar. Directly behind the car is a {argument name="airplane description" default="white Airbus A320 commercial airplane"} with "AIRBUS A320" painted on its fuselage and a blue tail. The car features black alloy wheels and a front license plate reading "{argument name="license plate text" default="A110 R"}". The hangar has a smooth, glossy concrete floor that clearly reflects both vehicles. On the left wall, a large sign reads "{argument name="hangar sign text" default="HANGAR 05 MAINTENANCE"}". The massive hangar doors are open in the background, revealing a bright, cloudy sky and a distant tarmac. Cinematic lighting, sharp focus, automotive photography style.

items.title: Cinematic Mesoamerican Warrior Portrait
items.description: Generates a highly detailed, photorealistic portrait of an ancient warrior in ceremonial armor standing before a towering stepped pyramid.
items.prompt: A photorealistic, highly detailed portrait of a muscular {argument name="warrior culture" default="Mesoamerican"} warrior standing proudly. He wears an elaborate headdress adorned with {argument name="headdress feathers" default="red, green, and black feathers"} and a carved stone mask. His face features dark painted lines across his cheeks and nose. He is outfitted in heavy, intricate ceremonial armor, including a large stone necklace with a face pendant, armbands, and a detailed belt with a loincloth featuring carved glyphs and faces. In his right hand, he grips a {argument name="weapon" default="tall wooden spear with a stone tip and red tassels"}, and in his left hand, he holds a round shield displaying a large carved face with red fringed edges. The background features a towering {argument name="background structure" default="ancient stepped stone pyramid"} with steep stairs, banners hanging near the top entrance, and small figures standing on the steps. Lush green jungle foliage surrounds the temple under a partly cloudy sky, with a tall carved stone stela standing in the right foreground, all captured with {argument name="lighting style" default="epic cinematic lighting"}.

Bright, sunny daylight casts distinct shadows on the asphalt, emphasizing the car's glossy finish.

items.title: Realistic Ancient Chinese Street Scene
items.description: Generates a hyper-detailed, bustling historical street scene inspired by classic Chinese scroll paintings.
items.prompt: A highly detailed, {argument name="art style" default="hyper-realistic cinematic 3D render"} of an {argument name="historical setting" default="ancient Chinese street scene inspired by Along the River During the Qingming Festival"}. The elevated, wide-angle perspective looks down upon a bustling dirt crossroad surrounded by traditional wooden buildings with intricate grey tiled roofs. On the left, a building features a sign reading "安居客栈" with red lanterns hanging outside. The scene is densely populated with dozens of villagers, merchants, and travelers in traditional period clothing. People are engaged in various activities: carrying woven baskets on shoulder poles, tending to market stalls under large wooden parasols, riding horses, and pulling a wooden cart with large spoked wheels in the lower right. A large, leafy green tree stands centrally among the shops, and weeping willow branches frame the extreme left foreground. The atmosphere is lively and dusty, illuminated by {argument name="lighting" default="warm afternoon sunlight"} that casts sharp, intricate shadows across the highly textured, hyper-detailed environment.

items.title: Traditional Chinese Ink Wash Banquet
items.description: Generates a traditional Chinese landscape painting of scholars drinking wine, complete with a calligraphy scroll at the top.
items.prompt: A highly detailed {argument name="art style" default="traditional Chinese ink wash painting"} of an outdoor banquet. Across the top, an unrolled scroll displays Chinese calligraphy reading {argument name="scroll text" default="君不見，黃河之水天上來"}. Below, a landscape features a waterfall and red sun on the left, and a full moon over a water pavilion on the right. In the foreground, 10 figures gather around a stone table. The central bearded man in white robes is {argument name="central figure action" default="standing and raising a wine cup to the sky"}. He is surrounded by 8 seated scholars drinking and 1 servant boy carrying a wine jar. The table holds fruit and metal pitchers. Large ceramic wine jars sit on the ground. On the left, 3 goats rest among rocks. In the background right, 1 figure rides a horse near pine trees.

items.title: Cinematic Night Portrait of a Woman Smoking
items.description: Generates a photorealistic, moody nighttime portrait of a woman leaning on a balcony, ideal for cinematic character concepts.
items.prompt: A photorealistic portrait of a young Asian woman with a {argument name="hair style and color" default="short black bob haircut and bangs"}, seen in profile. She is {argument name="action" default="smoking a cigarette"}, holding it to her lips with her right hand, with a thin trail of blue smoke rising. She is {argument name="setting" default="leaning against a metal balcony railing at night"}. She wears a {argument name="clothing" default="white camisole and a light grey oversized cardigan that has slipped off her shoulder"}, exposing her bare shoulder and back. She has a small pearl earring. The background is dark with blurred, out-of-focus warm city lights. The image features a {argument name="aesthetic" default="cinematic, moody atmosphere with noticeable film grain and a direct flash photography aesthetic"}.

items.title: Two Men Celebrating at a Restaurant
items.description: A candid photograph of two men enthusiastically celebrating at an upscale restaurant table.
items.prompt: A candid, warm-toned photograph of two men sitting at a table in a {argument name="setting" default="dimly lit upscale restaurant at night"}. On the left is a {argument name="left person description" default="man with dark hair wearing a dark grey crewneck sweater"}. On the right is a {argument name="right person description" default="man with glasses and receding curly dark hair wearing a dark blue sweater over a collared shirt"}. They are {argument name="emotion and action" default="celebrating enthusiastically, mouths wide open cheering, clasping one hand together while raising their other fists in triumph"}. The table is covered with a white tablecloth and features two menus with the text "THE GREENE", water glasses, a glass of red wine, and a small lit candle in a ribbed glass holder. The background shows blurred restaurant interiors and dark windows with distant city lights, creating an intimate and joyful atmosphere.

items.title: Anime Female Wrestler in Arena
items.description: Generates an anime-style illustration of a female wrestler posing in a ring with a custom text logo.
items.prompt: An anime illustration of a confident female wrestler standing in a ring. She has {argument name="hair color" default="blonde"} hair in a high ponytail with a pink bow. She wears a {argument name="outfit color" default="pink"} one-piece leotard with white and gold accents, matching fingerless gloves, and knee-high lace-up boots. She poses with one hand on her hip under bright stadium spotlights, with a blurred audience in the background. A stylized logo in the bottom left reads "{argument name="logo text" default="Sunset Emilia"}". The style features detailed shading and glossy skin highlights.

items.title: Cosplayer Portrait at Convention
items.description: Generates a photorealistic image of a cosplayer posing at a busy convention, ideal for character visualization or event photography mockups.
items.prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a female cosplayer at a {argument name="setting" default="crowded anime convention hall"}. She has long {argument name="hair color" default="teal"} hair, {argument name="eye color" default="heterochromia, one blue and one amber"} eyes, and wears {argument name="headwear" default="deer antlers and a small purple crown"} with a yellow rose clip. Her outfit is a {argument name="outfit style" default="teal two-piece idol costume with ruffled skirt"}, gold trim, wave patterns, gem choker, black fingerless gloves, and fishnet tights. She poses with a peace sign and one hand on her hip against a blurred background of convention attendees and bokeh lighting.

She is {argument name="pose" default="standing with her hands clasped gently in front of her waist, legs slightly crossed in a relaxed posture"}. items.title: 4-Panel Woodcut Portrait Wallpaper
items.description: Generates a four-panel split wallpaper featuring distinct portraits in a high-contrast printmaking style.
items.prompt: A desktop wallpaper featuring a horizontal four-panel split layout with thick black borders. It showcases half-body portraits in a high-contrast {argument name="art style" default="woodcut printmaking"} style with thick black lines and cross-hatching, conveying a confident and elite mood. From left to right: {argument name="subject 1" default="Jack Ma"} against a textured orange background; {argument name="subject 2" default="Elon Musk"} in a suit against a textured red background; {argument name="subject 3" default="Mark Zuckerberg"} in a black shirt against a textured blue background; and {argument name="subject 4" default="Pony Ma"} wearing glasses and a suit against a textured green background. The subjects are rendered in monochromatic beige tones, contrasting sharply with the vibrant background of each pane.

items.description: A creative fashion prompt for generating a futuristic jacket without any zippers, buttons, or visible fasteners.
items.prompt: A {argument name="clothing item" default="jacket"} with no zip, no buttons, no fastening — closes perfectly.

items.title: Anime Girl Smug Peace Sign Portrait
items.description: Generates an anime-style portrait of a girl making a peace sign with customizable hair, eyes, and background colors.
items.prompt: An anime-style illustration of a young girl with {argument name="hair color" default="silver"} hair styled in long twin tails secured with black ribbons, and {argument name="eye color" default="pink"} eyes. She has a {argument name="expression" default="smug smile with a slight blush"} and is looking directly at the viewer. She is posing dynamically, leaning forward slightly with one hand making a peace sign near her cheek and the other hand resting on her hip. She is wearing a white long-sleeved blouse featuring ruffles down the center and at the cuffs, a black ribbon tied at the collar, and a black high-waisted skirt with a ruffled hem and corset-style lacing. The background is a solid {argument name="background color" default="vibrant pink"} with a subtle vignette effect. The art style is high-quality, detailed anime illustration with soft lighting and glossy hair highlights.

items.title: Anime Girl in Space Elevator
items.description: Generates an anime-style illustration of a character looking up at a massive space structure from inside a glass elevator.
items.prompt: A high-angle, anime-style illustration of a girl with {argument name="hair color" default="long dark hair with purple tips"} standing inside a futuristic glass elevator, looking up at a massive space elevator structure. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="sailor uniform with a pleated skirt and thigh-high socks"}. The elevator cab has metallic railings, glowing cyan accents, and a digital display showing an upward arrow and the text "{argument name="altitude text" default="005829 km"}". Through the large glass ceiling and windows, a colossal, intricately detailed space station with a central pillar and a large ring structure is visible against a backdrop of a starry sky and the curvature of {argument name="planet" default="Earth"} with clouds below. The lighting is dramatic, emphasizing the vast scale of the space structure and the atmospheric perspective.

items.prompt: A photorealistic portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="beautiful young Asian woman"} with {argument name="hair style" default="long dark wavy hair with side-swept bangs"}. She wears an {argument name="outfit" default="elegant black off-the-shoulder satin dress"} and pearl stud earrings, smiling gently at the camera. The background is a {argument name="background setting" default="blurred luxurious interior with warm bokeh lights"}. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed.

items.title: Photorealistic Portrait of a Young Woman
items.description: Generates a highly detailed, photorealistic portrait of a young woman with customizable features, clothing, and background.
items.prompt: A photorealistic, high-quality portrait of a beautiful young {argument name="nationality" default="Japanese"} woman. She has {argument name="hair style" default="long black wavy hair with bangs"}, dark brown eyes, fair skin, and a {argument name="expression" default="gentle smile"} while looking directly at the camera. She is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="simple white blouse"}. The image features soft, flattering portrait lighting and a shallow depth of field, set against a {argument name="background" default="blurred warm indoor setting"} with beautiful bokeh. Shot on an 85mm lens, highly detailed.

items.title: Photorealistic Neon Tokyo Street Scene
items.description: Generates a highly detailed, photorealistic night view of a bustling Japanese city street with customizable neon signs and billboards.
items.prompt: A photorealistic night street photography shot of a bustling {argument name="city location" default="Tokyo"} street, heavily illuminated by densely packed vertical neon signs and billboards. On the left, a bright pink sign prominently reads "{argument name="pink sign text" default="カラオケ"}" next to a white sign reading "牛角 焼肉". On the right, prominent signs include a yellow one reading "{argument name="yellow sign text" default="まんが喫茶 4F"}", a white one reading "東南 本館 2F", and a red one reading "{argument name="red sign text" default="中華食堂 一番館 B1"}". In the center distance, a large blue billboard displays "{argument name="billboard text" default="open TOKYO"}" above a digital screen showing a person with the text "YUNIKA VISION". The street level is crowded with the backs of pedestrians' heads walking through the vibrant, glowing urban canyon. The lighting is high contrast with rich neon colors reflecting off the surroundings.

items.title: Photorealistic Shibuya Street Selfie
items.description: Generates a photorealistic selfie of a young woman on a Japanese city street with customizable text on signs and buildings.
items.prompt: A photorealistic selfie of a young Japanese woman standing on a sunny city street in {argument name="location" default="Shibuya, Japan"}. She has a soft smile, fair skin, light makeup, and {argument name="hair style" default="long wavy brown hair with see-through bangs"}. She is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="white textured blouse"} with a delicate necklace and a beige shoulder bag strap visible. The background features a bustling urban environment with a crosswalk, pedestrians on the sidewalk, and a large white commercial building displaying the text {argument name="building text" default="MODI"} at the top along with a digital billboard. On the left side of the frame, a vertical street sign clearly displays the text {argument name="street sign text" default="渋谷区 神南一丁目 8"}. The image has a bright, natural daylight aesthetic typical of a casual social media photo.

items.title: Handwritten Japanese Study Notes
items.description: A photorealistic top-down view of an open notebook with handwritten Japanese study notes and a pencil, useful for educational or aesthetic mockups.
items.prompt: A top-down photorealistic image of an open lined notebook resting on a smooth wooden desk. A dark green HB pencil with a silver ferrule and white eraser lies diagonally on the desk to the right of the notebook. The notebook pages are filled with neat, handwritten text in pencil, resembling a student's study notes. On the left page, the top left corner reads {argument name="date" default="2024年5月20日(月)"} above {argument name="subject" default="国語 「枕草子」"}. Below this is a rectangular boxed heading reading {argument name="left page heading" default="清少納言のものの見方"}, followed by exactly three bulleted sentences: one about valuing the changes in nature and seasons, one about finding beauty and amusement in small everyday things, and one about being honest with one's senses while having a sense of humor. Further down is a cloud-shaped border containing a heading translated as 'Words that left an impression', followed by a famous classical quote about spring mornings and a brief explanation below it marked with an arrow. On the right page, the top section has the heading {argument name="right page heading" default="〈現代とのちがい〉"} with exactly two bulleted points: one noting that the perception of seasons is much more delicate than today, and another stating that the perspective is sensory and poetic. This is followed by an arrow pointing to a concluding thought about wanting to cherish this sensibility. Below this is another cloud-shaped border containing a heading translated as 'Summary' and a short paragraph about how the 1000-year-old text still resonates today and the importance of carefully observing nature. At the bottom right of the page, there is a small, simple line drawing of a leafy plant stem next to a scalloped thought bubble containing the text {argument name="final thought" default="感性をみがくって、素敵なことだなあ。"}. The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting the texture of the paper and the graphite pencil marks.

items.title: Mars Rover Discovery Photo
items.description: Generates a photorealistic, raw space agency style image of a Mars rover discovering alien artifacts, complete with a file name overlay.
items.prompt: A photorealistic, raw space agency photo of a {argument name="setting" default="Martian landscape"} with red dirt, scattered rocks, and a hazy orange sky. In the middle ground, {argument name="objects" default="two dark stone tablets covered in ancient carved hieroglyphs"} are jutting out of the ground at a slight angle. In the immediate foreground, the distinct {argument name="foreground element" default="shadow of a Mars rover"} is cast onto the rocky terrain, indicating the perspective of the photo. Across the top edge of the image, there is a plain white text overlay resembling a raw file name reading "{argument name="overlay text" default="ZCAM_0847_0734291854_678RAD_N0412172ZCAM08050_1100LUJ01.png"}". The lighting is harsh and realistic, mimicking actual extraterrestrial surface photography.

items.title: Google Street View Anomaly Screen Photo
items.description: Generates a realistic photograph of a computer screen displaying a Google Street View interface featuring a surreal or out-of-place architectural anomaly.

items.title: Paranormal Trail Camera Encounter
items.description: Generates a spooky, infrared trail camera image featuring wildlife, a mysterious glowing orb, and realistic camera data overlays.
items.prompt: A black and white infrared trail camera photo taken at night in a dense coniferous forest. In the foreground on the left, a large black bear is walking past, appearing slightly motion-blurred. In the center of the clearing, there is a perfectly circular, dark, barren patch of dirt on the forest floor. Hovering just above the ground at the far edge of this dark circle is a bright, glowing, spherical orb of light. The image features a grainy night vision aesthetic with visible underbrush, pine tree trunks, and a tree stump in the bottom right corner. A black data bar runs across the bottom edge containing white text: on the far left, an oval logo reading "{argument name="camera brand" default="RECONYX"}", followed by the timestamp "{argument name="timestamp" default="03:14:22 11-OCT-2023"}", then "{argument name="temperature" default="TEMP: 4°C"}", and on the far right, "{argument name="trigger info" default="TRIGGER: MOTION DUAL TRIGGER"}".

items.title: Satellite Anomaly Interface Mockup
items.description: Generates a realistic web interface for satellite imagery featuring a mysterious geometric anomaly, timeline thumbnails, and UI controls.

items.title: Intimidating Press Conference Meme
items.description: A photorealistic satirical image of a superhero intimidating a tech CEO at a White House press briefing.
items.prompt: A photorealistic, cinematic shot set in the {argument name="location" default="White House press briefing room"}. At the podium sits {argument name="seated character" default="Sam Altman"}, wearing a dark suit and blue tie, looking visibly uncomfortable and nervous, staring blankly ahead. Standing directly behind him is {argument name="standing character" default="Homelander from The Boys"}, wearing his signature blue superhero suit with red gloves and gold eagle shoulder pads. The standing character has one red-gloved hand resting heavily and intimidatingly on the seated character's shoulder, while using his other hand to drink from a {argument name="beverage" default="glass bottle of milk"} with a confident, slightly unhinged smirk. In the background, there is a US flag on the left and a blue oval White House seal on the wall behind them. The podium has a sign reading "THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON".

items.title: Fast Food Burger Advertisement Poster
items.description: Generates a professional food photography poster for a burger meal with customizable promotional text and branding.
items.prompt: A commercial food photography poster for a {argument name="burger type" default="shrimp burger"}. The central burger features a glossy brioche bun, lettuce, white sauce, spicy orange mayo, two grilled shrimp, and a thick crispy breaded patty. It rests on parchment paper on a wooden table, flanked by seasoned french fries on the left and two fried shrimp pieces on the bottom right. A blurred glass of iced cola and a faint {argument name="brand name" default="LOTTERIA"} logo appear in the dark background. The parchment bears a circular "SHRIMP BURGER" stamp. Top left Korean text reads {argument name="top left text" default="탱글한 통새우살이 입안 가득"}. The large central headline is {argument name="main headline" default="통새우 크런KIM버거"} with a small orange shrimp illustration. Below it is the subtitle {argument name="subtitle text" default="매콤바삭, 육즙가득! 올봄, 새우버거의 기준이 바뀐다!"}. The bottom left corner shows the {argument name="brand name" default="LOTTERIA"} logo. Warm, professional studio lighting.
