items.title: Mythological Action Game Screenshot
items.description: Generates a realistic video game screenshot of a warrior and a boy fighting a giant mythological boss, complete with HUD elements.
items.prompt: A highly realistic AAA video game screenshot depicting a boss fight inside a dusty, golden-lit {argument name="setting" default="ancient Egyptian temple"}. In the center background, a massive {argument name="boss name" default="ANUBIS"} boss monster with a jackal head, glowing eyes, and ornate gold armor roars while wielding a staff, kicking up swirling sand. In the left foreground, a muscular, bald warrior with red body tattoos faces the boss, holding a {argument name="weapon" default="curved blade"}. In the right midground, a young boy aims a bow at the boss. The image features 4 distinct UI components: a top-center red boss health bar labeled '{argument name="boss name" default="ANUBIS"}', a right-aligned quest tracker labeled '{argument name="quest name" default="THE JACKAL'S PATH"}' with the subtext 'Defeat Anubis', a bottom-left player status HUD showing health and rage bars alongside 4 diamond-shaped skill icons with button prompts, and a bottom-right companion HUD showing 2 circular skill icons.

items.title: Historical Figure Social Media Page
items.description: A creative prompt for generating a mock Twitter/X profile page for Oda Nobunaga just before the Honno-ji Incident.
items.prompt: Please create an X (Twitter) post page for Oda Nobunaga ({argument name="situation" default="just before the Honno-ji Incident"}).

items.title: Gritty Tattooed Woman Mugshot
items.description: Generates a realistic, gritty mugshot of a heavily tattooed woman holding a blurred placard against a height chart background.
items.prompt: A realistic, slightly grainy, low-lighting mugshot of a young woman with long, messy black hair, prominent cheekbones, and full lips. She has a small tattoo near her right eye and extensive, intricate mandala-style tattoos covering her neck, chest, and both hands/arms. She is wearing a simple black sleeveless top. She is holding up a rectangular white placard with blurred-out text, held with both hands showing long, manicured nails. The background is a plain white cinderblock wall with a height chart on the right side, showing numbers like 150, 160, and 170 in black stencil font. The overall aesthetic is gritty and raw, resembling a genuine police booking photograph.

items.title: Athleisure Street Style Paparazzi Shot
items.description: Generates a photorealistic, candid street style image of a woman in activewear walking outdoors.
items.prompt: A photorealistic street style paparazzi shot of a young woman walking through a {argument name="setting" default="sunny parking lot"}. She has {argument name="hair color and style" default="blonde hair in a high ponytail"} and is wearing {argument name="accessory" default="black rectangular sunglasses"}. Her outfit consists of a matching {argument name="activewear color" default="grey"} long-sleeve crop top and high-waisted leggings, paired with chunky white sneakers and white crew socks. Over her left arm, she carries a light blue denim jacket, while holding a {argument name="held item" default="beige insulated water bottle"} and a smartphone in the same hand. The background is blurred with a shallow depth of field, showing the rear of a dark car on the left and out-of-focus buildings and trees in the distance, capturing a casual, candid athleisure aesthetic in bright daylight.

items.title: Yoga Book Two-Page Spread
items.description: Generates a realistic two-page layout for a yoga instruction manual, featuring a main pose photo, step-by-step guide, and bilingual text.

items.title: Underwater Photorealistic Portrait
items.description: Generates a highly realistic underwater portrait featuring floating hair, bubbles, and dynamic caustic lighting effects.
items.prompt: A photorealistic underwater portrait of a {argument name="subject description" default="young Asian woman"} holding her breath just below the surface. She has {argument name="hair style" default="long dark wavy hair"} floating weightlessly around her face and is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="sheer white ruffled dress"}. She looks directly at the camera with slightly puffed cheeks and pursed lips. The scene is illuminated by bright sunlight filtering through the {argument name="environment" default="clear blue water"}, casting intricate, dappled caustic light patterns across her face, chest, and clothing. Small, delicate air bubbles float upward around her face, adding to the serene, ethereal atmosphere.

items.title: Amateur Handwritten Notebook Photo Prompt
items.description: Generates a realistic iPhone-style photo of an open notebook with messy handwritten notes, mimicking a natural desk environment with window lighting.
items.prompt: Amateur photo of {argument name="item" default="an open notebook"} lying flat, filled with handwritten notes in {argument name="pen type" default="black ballpoint pen"}. The handwriting is casual and slightly messy, like personnal notes, natural imperfections, crossed out words, underlined headings. Shot from slightly above, natural daylight from a window, no flash. Casual desk setting, shot on {argument name="device" default="iPhone"}

items.title: Emoji-Faced Figure in Wet Night Alley
items.description: Generates a moody, high-contrast illustration of a person with an emoji for a face standing in a wet, lamp-lit alleyway.
items.prompt: A full-body portrait of a person standing in a {argument name="setting" default="narrow wet cobblestone alleyway at night"}. The person is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="dark jacket and dark trousers"}, with one hand resting against the rough, textured wall on the left and the other hand casually tucked into their pocket. Their face is completely obscured by a {argument name="face replacement" default="large yellow smiling emoji with blushing cheeks"}. The scene is illuminated by a single vintage street lamp mounted on the right wall, casting warm yellow light that reflects beautifully off the wet paving stones, creating deep, moody shadows. In the background, a small illuminated sign reads "{argument name="background sign text" default="三条小路"}". The artwork is a {argument name="art style" default="modern digital illustration with high contrast lighting and subtle shin-hanga influences"}, featuring a red square seal in the bottom right corner with the text "新版画" and a blank white vertical signature box with a tiny red seal in the bottom left.

items.title: Figure with Emoji Head in Sunlit Alley
items.description: Generates an anime-style illustration of a stylishly dressed figure with an emoji head leaning against a wall in a high-contrast, sunlit alleyway.
items.prompt: An anime-style illustration of a figure leaning against a textured stone wall in a narrow, sunlit alleyway. The figure has a {argument name="head type" default="large yellow smiling emoji with rosy cheeks"} for a head. They wear a {argument name="outfit" default="loose black overcoat, black shirt, wide-leg black trousers, and black dress shoes"}. The character's left foot rests on a stone block, right hand in pocket, and left hand near the neck. The scene includes reflective stone pavement, a distant streetlamp, and golden-lit foliage. The lighting features dramatic chiaroscuro and sharp shadows.

items.title: Surreal Ice Cave Flash Photography
items.description: Generates a realistic flash-photography style image of a person relaxing in an ice cave with a sports car embedded in the wall.
items.prompt: A realistic image shot with {argument name="lighting style" default="harsh direct flash photography"} inside an {argument name="environment" default="ice cave made of large ice blocks and snow"}. A young man with messy dark curly hair sits on a brown fur pelt, leaning his head on his hand with a relaxed expression. He is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="thick black and white patterned knit sweater"}, black snow pants, and black winter boots. Directly behind him, the rear half of a white {argument name="car model" default="Porsche 911 GT3 RS"} sports car is embedded into the snowy cave wall, with its red taillights illuminated and a license plate reading {argument name="license plate" default="VS 369 911"}. In the foreground, a rough wooden table dusted with snow holds exactly 2 stainless steel thermoses, 1 clear textured glass, 1 small metal cooking pot, and 1 yellow and blue matchbox. Resting on the icy floor to the right are 1 green glass bottle and 1 vintage metal lantern.

items.title: FPS Custom Weapon Skin Screenshot
items.description: Generates a first-person shooter perspective of a customized weapon skin with game UI overlays and a tactical map background.
items.prompt: First-person perspective video game screenshot showing hands wearing {argument name="glove style" default="Spider-Man suit"} gloves holding an AK-47 assault rifle. The weapon features a custom {argument name="weapon theme" default="Spider-Man"} skin with a red and blue color scheme, black webbing patterns, a white spider emblem on the receiver, "CS2" on the handguard, "MARVEL" on the magazine, and "SPIDER-MAN" on the stock. The background is a dusty Middle Eastern town street resembling a tactical shooter map, featuring a sign reading "HOTEL AURORE" with an arrow pointing to "A". The top center UI displays a red shield with a black spider, the text "{argument name="weapon title" default="AK-47 | Web-Slinger"}", and "The CS2 Collection" above a red line. The bottom UI features exactly 5 minimalist white icons on the left and the word "CLOSE" on the right.

items.title: Candid Wine Bar Portrait
items.description: Generates a photorealistic, candid-style portrait of a person sitting at a table with drinks and a background of illuminated shelves.
items.prompt: A candid, photorealistic portrait of a young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="long blonde hair"} wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="dark brown leather blazer"}. She is sitting at a table in a {argument name="setting" default="restaurant or wine bar"}, resting her chin on her hand and looking off to the side with {argument name="expression" default="pursed lips"}. In front of her on the white tablecloth are two glasses: a large glass of {argument name="drink" default="red wine"} and a smaller glass of water. The background features brightly lit, modern shelving filled with rows of wine bottles. Warm, ambient lighting, shot on a smartphone.

items.title: Vintage Amalfi Coast Travel Poster
items.description: A detailed prompt for generating a high-quality, 1960s-style travel poster of the Amalfi Coast, featuring vibrant colors and a cinematic pencil illustration aesthetic.
items.prompt: Modern pencil illustration of {argument name="location" default="Vintage travel poster illustration of the Amalfi Coast, Italy"}, panoramic coastal cliff road scene, classic 1960s white car driving along a curved seaside road, deep blue Mediterranean sea with small sailboats, colorful pastel hillside village, bright blue sky with soft clouds, lemon tree branches with vibrant yellow lemons framing the foreground, warm summer sunlight, bold vibrant colors, {argument name="style" default="retro 1950s travel poster"} style, cinematic composition, high detail, screen print texture, graphic illustration. Hand-drawn style, illustration with loose strokes and defined contours. High-contrast color palette, maintaining chromatic harmony between background and elements. Contemporary and decorative aesthetic.

items.title: Notebook Spread with 3D Model Analysis Diagrams
items.description: Generates a top-down photograph of an open notebook containing handwritten flowcharts, bullet points, and diagrams analyzing 3D model generation, useful for mockups of study notes or technical journaling.

items.title: Tech Keynote Presentation Slide
items.description: Generates a realistic photo of a tech executive presenting a humorous or customized data slide during a keynote.
items.prompt: A photograph of a tech keynote presentation. A bald man with glasses, wearing a dark blue sweater and jeans, stands on a stage to the left, smiling and pointing with both index fingers at a large presentation screen behind him. The screen displays a slide with a light blue background. At the top left is a small teal pill-shaped badge reading "NEW DATA". Below it, the main headline reads "{argument name="headline" default="Microsoft Edge is the #1 browser to download Google Chrome"}", with "#1" highlighted in blue. A subheadline reads "% of Google Chrome downloads that started from another browser". Below this is a bar chart with three bars. The first bar is tall and blue, labeled "38.6%" above it, with the Microsoft Edge logo and text "Microsoft Edge" below it. The second bar is shorter and gray, labeled "17.2%" above it, with the Mozilla Firefox logo and text "Mozilla Firefox" below it. The third bar is the shortest and gray, labeled "13.0%" above it, with the Apple Safari logo and text "Apple Safari" below it. At the bottom left of the slide, small text reads "Source: Microsoft internal analysis of Google Chrome download referrals Cohort: Windows 10 and 11, Worldwide, Jan - March 2024". To the left of the screen, a wooden panel features the Microsoft logo (four colored squares). The backs of audience members' heads are visible in the foreground at the bottom.

items.title: iPhone Photography Scene
items.description: This prompt creates a high-fidelity, realistic photograph that captures specific environmental details like reflections and natural handwriting, ideal for corporate or tech-themed imagery.
items.prompt: A wide image shot on {argument name="camera" default="iPhone"} of a glass whiteboard, in a room overlooking {argument name="landmark" default="the Bay Bridge"}. The field of view shows {argument name="subject" default="a woman writing"}, sporting a tshirt with a large OpenAl logo. The handwriting looks natural and a bit messy, and we see the photographer's reflection.

items.title: Celebrity Fast Food Worker Candid
items.description: Generates a photorealistic, candid image of a famous person working an everyday job at a fast-food restaurant.
items.prompt: A photorealistic candid photograph of {argument name="person" default="Sam Altman"} working behind the counter at a {argument name="restaurant brand" default="McDonald's"} restaurant. He is wearing a dark grey short-sleeve t-shirt under a black apron with yellow neck straps and the restaurant's logo, along with a white nametag reading "{argument name="nametag text" default="Sam"}". He has a slightly tired, focused expression, holding a {argument name="held item" default="red carton of french fries"} in his left hand while extending his right hand forward to serve a {argument name="served item" default="white drink cup with a straw"}. The background features a realistic, slightly blurred fast-food kitchen environment with stainless steel counters, a fry station glowing under warm heat lamps, digital order screens, a point-of-sale register, and another employee working in the distance. The lighting is typical indoor fluorescent, giving the image a documentary, everyday feel.

items.title: First-Person VRChat Meme Crossover Screenshot
items.description: Generates a first-person perspective screenshot of a virtual reality social game lobby featuring a crossover of anime and meme avatars with floating nameplates.
items.prompt: A first-person POV screenshot inside a {argument name="game environment" default="VRChat lobby"} featuring a dark checkered floor, a "VR CHAT" welcome sign on the left, a "Mirror" doorway, and an "Avatar Showcase" on the right. The viewer's hands are visible in the foreground, wearing white sleeves with red dashed stitching, reaching forward. A red muted microphone UI icon sits in the bottom left corner. In the center stands {argument name="tall character" default="Ran Mouri from Detective Conan in her blue school uniform"}, smiling with closed eyes and {argument name="action" default="patting the heads of the two smaller characters"}. On her left is {argument name="small character 1" default="Conan Edogawa in his blue suit and red bowtie"}. On her right is {argument name="small character 2" default="the Ugandan Knuckles meme character"}. Each character has a floating nameplate above them: the tall girl's reads "Ran Mouri" in yellow over "LetsAskAQuestion" in white, the boy's reads "Conan Edogawa" over "conan.exe", and the red creature's reads "Ugandan Knuckles" over "do u know de way".

items.title: Power Armor Mirror Selfie
items.description: Generates a realistic image of someone in weathered power armor taking a mirror selfie in a messy room.
items.prompt: A person wearing a highly detailed, weathered, and battle-damaged {argument name="armor type" default="T-60 power armor from Fallout"} taking a mirror selfie with a {argument name="phone type" default="black smartphone"}. The armor is bulky, metallic, and covered in grime, rust, and scratches, featuring a distinctive helmet with a respirator, headlamp, and thick shoulder pauldrons. The person is holding the phone in their right armored hand, positioned in front of their chest. The reflection is seen in a slightly dirty mirror with a dark wooden frame. In the background, there is a dimly lit, messy room with a {argument name="poster subject" default="Vault Boy poster"} partially visible on the wall behind the armor. The lighting is moody and realistic, emphasizing the textures of the metal and the gritty atmosphere.

items.title: Anime Starry Night Sky with Custom Neon Text
items.description: Generates a cinematic, anime-style starry night landscape featuring a sweeping Milky Way, shooting stars, and customizable glowing cursive text in the center.
items.prompt: A breathtaking anime-style landscape featuring a vibrant, starry night sky dominated by a brilliant, sweeping Milky Way in hues of deep purple, blue, and magenta. Two prominent shooting stars, one glowing bright blue and the other a softer pinkish-red, streak downwards across the sky, their tails intersecting. In the center of the sky, written in elegant, glowing cursive neon-like script, is the text "{argument name="custom text" default="Your Name"}", underlined by a delicate pink line that forms a small bow in the middle. Below, a serene landscape unfolds with dark, silhouetted clouds framing the edges. A distant town with glowing city lights sits nestled along the shores of a calm lake, reflecting the twilight colors of the horizon where the sun has just set, leaving a gradient of pink and orange. The foreground features dark silhouettes of grassy hills and subtle hints of purple flowers, adding depth to this magical, cinematic scene reminiscent of Makoto Shinkai's art style.

items.title: Anime Sunset Mountain Landscape
items.description: Generates a highly detailed, cinematic anime-style landscape featuring a character overlooking a vibrant sunset and mountains.
items.prompt: An anime-style illustration of a {argument name="character description" default="young woman with long dark hair wearing a dark jacket"} sitting on a rocky cliff edge, facing away to admire a vibrant {argument name="time of day" default="sunset"}. To the right stands a {argument name="architectural element" default="red torii gate and two glowing stone lanterns"}. The foreground features scattered {argument name="foliage" default="red maple leaves"}. Below stretches a vast mountainous landscape with a distant lake and a peak resembling Mt. Fuji. The sky is a breathtaking gradient of deep blue, purple, pink, and orange, detailed with clouds, stars, and {argument name="sky detail" default="two shooting stars"}. Highly detailed, cinematic anime background art.

items.title: Photorealistic Older Couple in a Pub
items.description: Generates a highly realistic portrait of an older couple enjoying drinks and snacks at a warmly lit pub table.
items.prompt: A photorealistic portrait of a smiling older Caucasian couple sitting at a rustic wooden table inside a {argument name="setting" default="cozy traditional pub"}. The man on the left has white hair and a full white beard, wearing a {argument name="man's clothing" default="green fleece jacket"} over a maroon shirt. The woman on the right has short grey hair and glasses, wearing a {argument name="woman's clothing" default="blue denim jacket and cream scarf"}. They are looking directly at the camera, each holding one of the 2 {argument name="beverage" default="glasses of beer"}. On the table in the foreground, there is 1 small lit brass lantern and 1 {argument name="table snacks" default="bowl of potato chips"}. The background features warm lighting, wooden paneled walls with framed pictures, windows on the left, and blurred patrons, creating a shallow depth of field.

items.title: Maze Solver Transformation
items.description: Instructs the model to visually solve a provided maze by drawing a colored path from the entrance to the exit.
items.prompt: Using the provided reference image, solve the maze by drawing a continuous {argument name="path color" default="red"} line that traces the correct route from the top-left entrance to the bottom-right exit. Keep the maze walls and the two running figures exactly as they are.

items.title: Steampunk Chibi Witch Sticker Illustration
items.description: Generates a 2D anime-style die-cut sticker illustration of a sleeping chibi character with steampunk elements and animal companions.
items.prompt: A 2D anime illustration of a sleeping {argument name="character type" default="chibi witch"} with black hair, wearing a large black hat decorated with {argument name="hat decoration" default="metal gears"} and a dark outfit with belts. She rests on a soft, dark blue starry pillow shaped like a crescent moon, with "ZZZ" floating near her head. She is accompanied by {argument name="animal companions" default="two black birds, one wearing a tiny top hat"}. The scene is framed by a circular night sky background featuring a glowing crescent moon and stars. The bottom edge is adorned with fluffy clouds and {argument name="props" default="steampunk gears, a glowing lantern, and a closed spellbook"}. The artwork features a {argument name="color palette" default="dark blue, black, and warm gold"} color palette and is styled as a paper cutout or die-cut sticker with a soft drop shadow against a plain off-white background.

items.title: Retro Anime Pastel Sleep Scene
items.description: Generates a vibrant, 90s anime-style illustration of a character sleeping in a cozy, pastel-colored bedroom with customizable text and colors.
items.prompt: An illustration in a {argument name="art style" default="90s retro anime aesthetic"} featuring a cute girl sleeping peacefully in bed. She has voluminous {argument name="hair color" default="pastel rainbow"} hair and is wearing large retro sunglasses with yellow frames and purple gradient lenses resting on her forehead. She wears colorful patterned pajamas and heart-shaped earrings, clutching a pink blanket decorated with pastel rainbows, hearts, and stars. The bedroom is bathed in a {argument name="color palette" default="vibrant neon pastel"} color palette with soft glowing lighting and sparkles. In the top right corner, a glowing cloud-shaped sign reads "{argument name="neon sign text" default="Sweet Dreams"}". A window on the left shows a dark blue night sky with a crescent moon and stars over a city silhouette. Hanging star ornaments dangle from the ceiling. On the bed next to her is 1 small yellow plushie with a pink bow. On a nightstand in the bottom right corner, there is 1 star-patterned lamp, 1 mug with a heart design, and 1 book titled "{argument name="book title" default="Good night"}".

items.title: Sleeping Anime Star Witch

She has round glasses and flowing {argument name="hair color" default="pastel rainbow"} hair. The scene is highly detailed and luminous, characterized by a soft, dreamy atmosphere and an {argument name="overall color palette" default="deep blues and luminous purples"} color palette.

items.title: Voxel Survival Game Boss Fight HUD
items.description: Generates a first-person screenshot of a blocky voxel game featuring a crossover boss fight and detailed UI overlays.
items.prompt:
{
  "type": "first-person video game screenshot",
  "setting": "blocky voxel world at night, purple corrupted biome with dark water and glowing torches",
  "entities": [
    "1 giant floating eyeball boss shooting a purple laser",
    "1 giant blue slime boss wearing a golden crown",
    "1 giant purple segmented worm monster",
    "1 player character in dark armor holding a green sword",
    "2 flying purple bat monsters",
    "2 blocky zombies",
    "2 blocky skeletons",
    "1 pink flamingo",
    "1 small blue slime"
  ],
  "perspective": "first-person, holding a large pixelated sword on the right side, white crosshair in center",
  "ui_elements": [
    {
      "position": "top-left",
      "text": "X: 340\nY: 64\nZ: -190\nBiome: {argument name=\"biome\" default=\"Corruption\"}"
    },
    {
      "position": "top-center",
      "text": "{argument name=\"boss name\" default=\"Eye of Cthulhu\"}",
      "description": "purple boss health bar"
    },
    {
      "position": "top-right",
      "text": "New Recipes Unlocked! Check your recipe book",
      "icon": "small floating eyeball"
    },
    {
      "position": "bottom-left",
      "text": "{argument name=\"player name\" default=\"Steve\"} has made the advancement [{argument name=\"boss name\" default=\"Eye of Cthulhu\"}]"
    },
    {
      "position": "bottom-center",
      "description": "HUD with 10 red hearts, 10 hunger drumsticks, green experience number 15, and a 9-slot hotbar",
      "hotbar_items": [
        "purple sword",
        "pickaxe",
        "axe",
        "green weapon",
        "gun",
        "30 red potions",
        "64 brown blocks",
        "8 golden apples",
        "2 blue stars"
      ]
    }
  ]
}

The device has a weathered olive-drab metal casing, various analog dials, a glowing orange power button, and a radiation gauge. A hand on the right side is adjusting a large black dial. The curved screen of the device is displaying {argument name="screen content" default="the classic video game Super Mario Bros, specifically World 1-1"}. The game is rendered in {argument name="screen style" default="monochrome green CRT pixel art with scanlines"}, showing the player character facing an enemy near a pipe and floating blocks, with text at the top reading "MARIO 000100", a coin icon with "x00", "WORLD 1-1", and "TIME 388". The background is a {argument name="background setting" default="blurred post-apocalyptic wasteland"} in daylight.

items.title: Japanese Breaking News Broadcast Generator
items.description: Generates a photorealistic television news broadcast scene featuring an anchor, a customizable background monitor graphic, and a lower-thirds breaking news banner.
items.prompt: A photorealistic television news broadcast scene. On the right, a young Japanese female news anchor with shoulder-length dark brown hair and bangs looks directly at the camera with a professional expression. She wears a dark navy blazer over a white top, small earrings, and a lavalier microphone. The studio background features modern blue and silver illuminated panels. On the left, a large monitor displays a news graphic. The top of the monitor reads "{argument name="game name" default="Tokitori"}" followed by "{argument name="monitor top text" default="世界でも大人気のヒヨコゲーム"}". The left side of the monitor shows game cover art featuring a {argument name="character description" default="round, yellow chick character with big eyes"} on a green field, with the title "{argument name="game name" default="Tokitori"}" and text reading "{argument name="monitor achievement text" default="Steam売上 宇宙1位"}", "販売本数 1億本突破", and "同時接続数 345万人". The right side of the monitor displays a line graph titled "売り上げ推移" with an upward-trending yellow arrow, y-axis labels "0", "5000万", and "1億", and 3 x-axis dates "4/1", "4/10", and "4/20". A flat 2D version of the yellow chick sits on the graph line. Across the bottom of the screen is a prominent red lower-thirds breaking news banner. The left side of the banner has a box reading "速報" and the main text reads "{argument name="breaking news headline" default="TokitoriがSteam売り上げ宇宙1位に"}".

She is smiling and looking directly at the camera, with her hands resting near a tablet, papers, and a clear water bottle. To her left, a large monitor displays the text "{argument name="screen main text" default="OpenAI 「GPT-image-2」リリース"}" alongside an AI logo and a collage of 8 smaller diverse AI-generated images. To the anchor's left is a large presentation monitor displaying a news graphic with a white background and light blue network nodes. The monitor features a dark blue "最新情報" tag, the text "{argument name="subheadline" default="OpenAIの新しい画像生成モデル"}", a large prominent headline "{argument name="main headline" default="「GPT-image-2」"}", the text "がリリース", an OpenAI logo, and a dark blue bottom banner reading "より高精細に より正確に 画像生成の可能性がさらに広がる". Across the bottom of the entire screen is a news ticker lower third with a dark blue "速報" box and the scrolling text "{argument name="ticker text" default="OpenAI 画期的な新画像生成モデル「GPT-image-2」をリリース"}".

The car features the number 1 and 'F3 FIA FORMULA 3 CHAMPIONSHIP' decals, with a helmeted driver seated inside. The setting is a dark industrial facility with a metallic grid floor. On the left wall, a dark sign displays the text {argument name="wall sign text" default="流体可視化実験 (煙による流れの観察) 車両周りの空気の流れを煙を用いて可視化しています。"} alongside 'F3 WIND TUNNEL TEST'. In the bottom right foreground, a black box labeled {argument name="box label" default="スモークジェネレータ"} sits next to a computer monitor showing a live feed of the car and the telemetry text {argument name="monitor text" default="風速: 50 m/s ヨー角: 0 deg 煙: ON"}. Dramatic, realistic engineering photography.

A foreground wooden desk holds a retro 1990s laptop with the company logo, a mug reading "BUILD THE FUTURE TOGETHER", a walkie-talkie, and a WIRED magazine titled "{argument name="magazine headline" default="THE AGE OF INTELLIGENCE IS HERE"}". Painted wall signs read "NEW YORK NO SLEEP. BIG DREAMS." and "THE FUTURE WILL BE BUILT 1996".

She is wearing a spectacular, structured haute couture dress made entirely of folded {argument name="dress material" default="vintage maps"}, featuring sharp, origami-like geometric layers and a strapless bodice. She has dark hair swept up, striking facial features, and wears large circular earrings resembling compasses. Surrounding her in the air are exactly 7 floating {argument name="floating objects" default="elongated compass needles with clock faces in the center"}. The image features {argument name="lighting" default="cinematic late afternoon lighting"}, casting soft shadows and highlighting the textures of the paper dress and the dry earth. Photorealistic, surreal fashion photography.

items.title: Cinematic Perfume Product Shot in Flooded Ruins
items.description: Generates a high-end, atmospheric product advertisement featuring a perfume bottle in a flooded classical setting with customizable typography.
items.prompt: A cinematic product photography shot of an elegant, rectangular glass perfume bottle with a faceted crystal cap and gold accents, sitting in the center of a shallowly flooded ancient stone temple corridor. The bottle features a minimalist square label with a delicate flower logo and the text {argument name="brand name" default="AURÉLIA"} above "EAU DE PARFUM". The setting is ethereal and hazy, bathed in warm, golden volumetric lighting that creates glowing reflections on the rippled water surface. In the background, classical ruins emerge from the water: a fallen stone head on the left and a headless draped statue on the right. At the bottom of the image, elegant typography overlays the scene, featuring the large serif text {argument name="brand name" default="AURÉLIA"}, followed by "EAU DE PARFUM", a matching flower logo, and the tagline {argument name="tagline" default="ETERNAL. RADIANT. UNFORGETTABLE."} in a clean, spaced-out font.

items.title: Sci-Fi Orbital Art Museum
items.description: Generates a cinematic scene of an art restorer working inside a zero-gravity space station museum.
items.prompt:
A cinematic sci-fi illustration of a vast, ornate space station museum orbiting an {argument name="planet type" default="Earth-like planet"}. In the foreground, a man in a dark utility jumpsuit carefully cleans a large, framed {argument name="art style" default="classical landscape"} painting. To the left, a classical marble bust is bound in wire. The zero-gravity environment features floating artifacts, including wrapped bundles and framed paintings suspended in mid-air. Massive arched windows reveal a breathtaking view of space. {argument name="atmosphere" default="Volumetric light rays stream through the dusty atmosphere"}, illuminating the grand, decaying architecture. A hanging dark banner reads "{argument name="banner text" default="THE MEMORY OF BEAUTY OUTLIVES US
CARE FOR IT.

MUSEUM INITIATIVE
SOL 4127"}". The lighting is dramatic and moody, emphasizing the epic scale of art preservation in space.

items.title: Multi-Panel Comic Book Page
items.description: Generates a fully lettered, multi-panel comic book page featuring dynamic action, dialogue, narration, and integrated typography.
items.prompt:
{
  "type": "full comic book page",
  "style": "modern western comic art, dynamic action, {argument name=\"color palette\" default=\"neon pink, purple, and deep blue night cityscape\"}",
  "header": {
    "title": "{argument name=\"hero name\" default=\"NIGHTWING\"}",
    "subtitle": "\"{argument name=\"comic title\" default=\"LEAP OF FAITH\"}\"",
    "credits": [
      "Writer TOM TAYLOR",
      "Artist BRUNO REDONDO",
      "Colorist ADRIANO LUCAS",
      "Letterer WES ABBOTT"
    ]
  },
  "character": "{argument name=\"hero description\" default=\"young athletic male vigilante in a black suit with a blue wing emblem across the chest and arms, wearing a black domino mask and wielding two blue escrima sticks\"}",
  "panels": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "position": "top right",
      "scene": "hero crouching on a rooftop gargoyle overlooking the city",
      "location_box": "{argument name=\"city name\" default=\"BLÜDHAVEN\"}. 11:47 P.M.",
      "narration_boxes": 3,
      "narration_text": [
        "Some nights the city feels quieter. That's when you know trouble's brewing underneath the silence.",
        "Blüdhaven raised me. It's flawed. It's messy. But it's mine.",
        "So I protect it. Not for glory. Not for revenge. For the people who can't protect themselves."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "position": "middle left",
      "scene": "hero looking at glowing blue monitors showing a bank building",
      "monitor_text": "ATTENTION UNITS. REPORTS OF AN ARMED ROBBERY IN PROGRESS. LOCATION: THE ROYAL BANK OF BLÜDHAVEN.",
      "narration_boxes": 1,
      "narration_text": ["Guess the night just got louder."]
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "position": "middle right",
      "scene": "hero leaping dynamically forward, sticks drawn",
      "speech_bubbles": 1,
      "speech_text": ["ON MY WAY."],
      "sound_effect": "WHAK (yellow)"
    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "position": "bottom left",
      "scene": "two masked robbers inside a bank, one holding a gun",
      "speech_bubbles": 2,
      "speech_text": ["FREEZE! NOBODY MOVE!", "WHAT THE--?"]
    },
    {
      "id": 5,
      "position": "bottom middle",
      "scene": "hero dropping from above, striking the robbers",
      "speech_bubbles": 2,
      "speech_text": ["YOU PICKED THE WRONG NIGHT...", "...TO TRY THE WRONG BANK."],
      "sound_effect": "THUD (orange)"
    },
    {
      "id": 6,
      "position": "bottom right",
      "scene": "close-up portrait of the hero smiling confidently",
      "speech_bubbles": 2,
      "speech_text": ["COPS'LL BE HERE SOON.", "MAYBE USE THIS TIME TO RETHINK YOUR CAREER CHOICES."]
    },
    {
      "id": 7,
      "position": "bottom wide",
      "scene": "silhouette of hero on rooftop, police cars with flashing lights below, bat-like emblem in the sky",
      "narration_boxes": 3,
      "narration_text": ["Another night. Another save.", "That's the deal I made with myself.", "And I intend to keep it."]
    }
  ],
  "footer": {
    "creator_credit": "NIGHTWING created by MARV WOLFMAN & GEORGE PÉREZ.",
    "teaser": "NEXT: A LEAD. A LIE. A LEGACY."
  }
}

items.title: Multi-Panel Comic Book Page

items.title: Full-Page Superhero Comic Layout
items.description: Generates a highly detailed, multi-panel comic book page complete with title credits, dynamic superhero action scenes, and narrative text boxes.
items.prompt:
{
  "type": "comic book page layout",
  "header": {
    "title": "{argument name=\"main title\" default=\"the AMAZING SPIDER-MAN\"}",
    "subtitle": "{argument name=\"subtitle\" default=\"NO SMALL CHOICES\"}",
    "part": "PART ONE",
    "credits": [
      "ZEB WELLS WRITER",
      "JOHN ROMITA JR. PENCILS",
      "KLAUS JANSON INKS",
      "BRITTANY PEZZILLO COLORS",
      "VC'S JOE SABINO LETTERS"
    ]
  },
  "panels": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "position": "top row",
      "visual": "{argument name=\"hero description\" default=\"superhero in red and blue suit with web patterns and spider logo\"} crouching on a rooftop overlooking a city skyline at sunset. Includes a right-side inset panel showing a close-up of the masked face.",
      "text_boxes": 3,
      "text_content": [
        "NEW YORK NEVER STOPS.",
        "AND SOME DAYS IT FEELS LIKE NEITHER DO I.",
        "BUT TODAY... I PAUSED."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "position": "second row",
      "visual": "{argument name=\"civilian description\" default=\"young man with brown hair\"} indoors, looking at a smartphone, holding a mug reading 'WORLD'S OKAYEST SCIENTIST'.",
      "text_boxes": 2,
      "speech_bubbles": 3,
      "text_content": [
        "CITYWIDE OUTAGE AVERTED THANKS TO EARLY RESPONSE BY LOCAL HEROES.",
        "--CHANNEL 5.",
        "\"LOCAL HEROES.\"",
        "THAT'S... NICE.",
        "BUT SOME PEOPLE DON'T GET HEADLINES."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "position": "third row",
      "layout": "diagonally split into 3 sub-scenes",
      "visuals": [
        "young man walking in a city crowd",
        "sepia-toned memory of an older man smiling",
        "superhero swinging on a web"
      ],
      "text_boxes": 4,
      "text_content": [
        "MY UNCLE BEN USED TO SAY:",
        "\"{argument name=\"famous quote\" default=\"WITH GREAT POWER COMES GREAT RESPONSIBILITY.\"}\"",
        "I THINK ABOUT THAT EVERY DAY.",
        "BEING SPIDER-MAN ISN'T JUST ABOUT STOPPING THE BIG THREATS."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "position": "fourth row, left",
      "visual": "superhero shooting a web, swinging into a chaotic street with civilians running from a fire/explosion.",
      "speech_bubbles": 1,
      "text_boxes": 1,
      "text_content": [
        "ON YOUR LEFT!",
        "IT'S ABOUT THE PEOPLE."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 5,
      "position": "fourth row, right",
      "visual": "close-up of a young Black girl smiling at the superhero.",
      "speech_bubbles": 1,
      "text_boxes": 1,
      "text_content": [
        "THANK YOU, SPIDER-MAN!",
        "ALWAYS."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 6,
      "position": "bottom row",
      "visual": "silhouette of the superhero sitting on a rooftop water tower at dusk.",
      "text_boxes": 2,
      "text_content": [
        "THE CITY NEEDS HOPE.",
        "AND AS LONG AS I CAN SWING, I'LL BE THERE."
      ],
      "footer_text": "TO BE CONTINUED!"
    }
  ]
}

items.title: Tech CEO Rivalry Meme Generator
items.description: Generates a photorealistic satirical image of a confident tech CEO standing next to a dejected rival, featuring customizable shirt text and background corporate branding.
items.prompt: A photorealistic image of {argument name="confident person" default="Sam Altman"} standing confidently on the left with his hands on his hips, wearing a black t-shirt with white text that reads "{argument name="shirt text" default="i ship faster than you code."}". Next to him on the right is {argument name="dejected person" default="Sundar Pichai"}, looking dejected and sad with his head bowed and hands clasped, wearing a plain dark grey t-shirt. They are standing indoors in front of a large glass window. Outside the window is a sunny corporate campus with trees, a small pond, and a modern glass building with the {argument name="background company logo" default="Google"} logo prominently displayed on it.

items.title: Tech CEO Writing on Whiteboard
items.description: A photorealistic corporate image of a tech executive writing customizable text on a whiteboard.
items.prompt: A photorealistic corporate photograph of a man resembling {argument name="person name" default="Sam Altman"} wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="black long-sleeve sweater"}, standing in profile and writing on a large whiteboard with a black marker. The whiteboard features clear, handwritten black text reading "{argument name="line 1 text" default="Model: ChatGPT"}" with "{argument name="line 2 text" default="Company: OpenAI"}" written directly below it. In the bottom right corner, smaller text reads "{argument name="signature text" default="- Sam Altman CEO, OpenAI"}". The scene is set in a bright, modern office with soft natural lighting and a softly blurred background.

items.title: Split-Face Typography Mask Portrait
items.description: Generates a dramatic portrait split in half, with the right side revealed through bold, stacked typography acting as a clipping mask.
items.prompt: A highly realistic, dramatic studio portrait of {argument name="subject" default="a man resembling Sam Altman with short wavy brown hair, blue eyes, thin eyebrows, and detailed skin texture"}, wearing a dark crew neck sweater. The composition is split vertically down the middle. The left half displays a standard photographic portrait against a dark background. The right half consists of a solid {argument name="background color" default="dark blue"} background with large, bold, sans-serif text acting as a clipping mask. The text reads "{argument name="overlay text" default="WE WANT GPT 5.5 ASAP"}", stacked vertically across five lines. The letters are transparent windows revealing the right half of the man's face and torso, perfectly aligned with the left side to complete the portrait through the typography.
items.authorName: マシモGPT🤖@ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini/GrokなどLLMをこねくり回す人

items.title: True Crime Investigation Thumbnail
items.description: Generates a dramatic, collage-style YouTube thumbnail for true crime or conspiracy videos, featuring a central portrait and thematic background elements.
items.prompt: A YouTube thumbnail-style collage for a {argument name="overall mood" default="dark, dramatic, true crime investigation"}. In the center is a highly detailed, close-up portrait of an {argument name="central figure" default="older man with grey hair and deep wrinkles resembling Jeffrey Epstein"}, wearing a black polo shirt, with a faint red glowing outline separating him from the background. On the left side, a {argument name="left background scene" default="tropical island with luxury villas and a flying airplane in a dark sky"}. Below the island, a conspiracy board motif features exactly 2 red push pins connected by 3 thick red strings. On the top right side, a hazy, sepia-toned depiction of the {argument name="right background scene" default="US Capitol building with the silhouettes of 3 men in suits facing it"}. On the bottom right, an open manila folder containing a {argument name="document type" default="heavily redacted dossier with thick black marker lines and a smaller photograph of the central man"}. The overall composition is cinematic, intense, and heavily stylized for a documentary video.

items.title: Anime Horror Game Thumbnail Composite
items.description: Generates a composite gaming video thumbnail featuring a central silhouette, a game logo, and four character portraits in torn-paper frames.
items.prompt: A composite YouTube thumbnail illustration featuring the logo for {argument name="game title" default="Doki Doki Literature Club!"} in the top center, designed as a pink circle with a blue heart, colorful block letters, and a green pen. Below the logo, in the lower center, is a {argument name="central figure" default="dark silhouette of a person sitting at a desk"} facing a glowing pink computer monitor in a dark room. The background is divided into 4 corner sections separated by torn paper edges, each containing a portrait of an anime girl in a school uniform. The top left corner shows a girl with long brown hair and a white bow smiling; the top right corner shows a girl with long dark purple hair looking sad; the bottom left corner shows a girl with short pink hair looking upset; and the bottom right corner shows a girl with short coral hair and a red bow smiling. Floating in the dark space between the characters and the central figure are exactly 3 large white question marks and 4 pieces of lined paper with blurry writing. The overall {argument name="atmosphere" default="dark, mysterious, and slightly unsettling"} contrasts sharply with the bright anime characters and colorful logo.

items.title: University Campus Aerial View
items.description: Generates a realistic aerial photograph of a large university campus with specific architectural landmarks, entrance gates, and a distant city skyline.
items.prompt: An aerial drone photograph of a sprawling, lush green university campus on a sunny day. In the foreground, a wide multi-lane road with cars passes through a large concrete entrance gate bearing the large white text "{argument name="university name" default="ODTÜ METÜ"}". To the right of the gate, two tall flagpoles fly a {argument name="flag 1" default="Turkish flag"} and a {argument name="flag 2" default="white flag with a red circular logo"}. The midground features a long rectangular reflecting pool surrounded by green lawns and pedestrian paths, flanked by various modernist concrete academic buildings. Notable structures include a cylindrical building with red and white horizontal stripes on the left and a large pyramid-shaped building on the right. In the background, a dense city skyline representing {argument name="city skyline" default="Ankara"} stretches across the horizon, featuring a prominent tall observation tower, backed by rolling hills and mountains under a clear blue sky with scattered white clouds.

items.title: Anime Ship Girl Saluting on Beach

items.prompt: An anime-style illustration of {argument name="character identity" default="Tokitsukaze from Kantai Collection"}, a young girl with fluffy short purple hair wearing a small black sailor hat with a gold anchor emblem perched on the side of her head. She has a {argument name="facial expression" default="big bright smile with closed eyes and blushing cheeks"}. She is wearing a white long-sleeved sailor uniform with a blue collar, a yellow neckerchief secured by a dark anchor-shaped clasp, and brown leather straps across her torso. Dark grey ship rigging cannons are visible mounted behind her back. She is {argument name="pose" default="saluting with her right hand"} near her forehead. The scene is set against a {argument name="background" default="sunny beach with blue ocean, white waves, and distant green cliffs under a clear blue sky"}. The lighting is bright and vibrant, highlighting the cheerful atmosphere.

items.title: Cinematic Tactical Command Scene

items.prompt: A cinematic, photorealistic shot of a {argument name="character appearance" default="handsome young man with spiky dark brown hair and rectangular glasses"}, wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="black leather tactical jacket with a high collar, silver chest badge, and white arm stripes"} along with black leather gloves and an earpiece. He is {argument name="action" default="leaning intensely over a glowing tactical map on a table, pointing at it with his right hand"}. The scene takes place in a {argument name="setting" default="dimly lit, gritty concrete command bunker"}. In the blurred background, {argument name="background characters" default="several soldiers in full black tactical gear and helmets"} stand at attention. The shoulder of another person in a black uniform is visible in the foreground left, framing the shot. The image features dark, moody lighting, shallow depth of field, and high-resolution gritty textures.
