items.title: Bedding Bundle Infographic
items.description: Generates a detailed product bundle infographic featuring a main lifestyle image, 6 component breakdown cards, and a 7-column pricing table.
items.prompt: { "type": "product bundle infographic", "header": { "brand_and_size": "{argument name=\"brand and size\" default=\"WLIVE セミダブル\"}", "title": "{argument name=\"main title\" default=\"上質化 一式セット\"}", "subtitle": "機能性はそのまま、見た目と寝心地をワンランクアップ" }, "layout": { "top_section": { "left_panel": { "title": "組み合わせイメージ", "bullet_points_count": 6, "bullet_categories": ["フレーム", "マットレス", "ベッドパッド", "カバー", "掛け布団", "枕"] }, "right_panel": { "image_description": "{argument name=\"main image description\" default=\"a neatly made semi-double bed with dark wood frame, headboard shelf with lights, white satin bedding, grey throw blanket, under-bed storage boxes, potted plant, and rug in a cozy bedroom\"}" } }, "middle_section": { "type": "product cards", "count": 6, "cards": [ { "number": 1, "title": "ベッドフレーム", "brand": "WLIVE セミダブル", "image_subject": "empty dark wood bed frame", "tag": "主軸維持" }, { "number": 2, "title": "マットレス", "brand": "アイリスオーヤマ ポケットコイル", "image_subject": "white quilted mattress", "tag": "寝心地強化" }, { "number": 3, "title": "ベッドパッド", "brand": "標準 or 安眠工場 ホテル仕様", "image_subject": "white quilted bed pad", "tag": "上位パッド(任意)" }, { "number": 4, "title": "カバーセット", "brand": "MILDLY 綿100% サテン調 3点セット", "image_subject": "folded white satin covers and pillows", "tag": "見た目強化" }, { "number": 5, "title": "掛け布団", "brand": "Kumori オールシーズン", "image_subject": "rolled white comforter", "tag": "価格抑制・清潔" }, { "number": 6, "title": "枕 2個セット", "brand": "整眠ラボ 高級ホテル仕様", "image_subject": "two white pillows", "tag": "質感向上" } ] }, "bottom_section": { "type": "pricing table", "label": "総費用 (本命構成)", "columns_count": 7, "columns": ["ベッドフレーム", "マットレス", "ベッドパッド", "カバーセット", "掛け布団", "枕 2個セット", "合計"], "total_price": "{argument name=\"total price\" default=\"49,471円\"}", "footer_note": "{argument name=\"footer note\" default=\"※価格は2024年時点のAmazon.co.jp 参考価格の一例です。変動する可能性があります。\"}" } } }

items.title: ChatGPT Image Generation Guide Infographic
items.description: A structured, multi-section infographic outlining best practices for generating and editing images, featuring icons, example graphics, and step-by-step tips.
items.prompt: {"type":"infographic","style":"clean, corporate, flat design, pastel accents, dark blue primary color","header":{"logo":"swirl icon","academy_name":"{argument name=\"academy name\" default=\"OpenAI Academy\"}","main_title":"{argument name=\"main title\" default=\"ChatGPTで画像を作る・直すための実践ガイド\"}","metadata":"date and page info","summary_box":{"title":"要点","content":"paragraph about key points"}},"layout":{"sections":[{"number":1,"title":"{argument name=\"section 1 title\" default=\"よい画像プロンプトの書き方\"}","layout":"two columns","left_column":{"count":6,"items":[{"icon":"target","label":"目的を明確に"},{"icon":"landscape","label":"主題・状況・場所を指定"},{"icon":"brush","label":"スタイル・雰囲気を指定"},{"icon":"sun","label":"光・質感・構図を指定"},{"icon":"prohibition","label":"制約・除外事項を明記"},{"icon":"pencil","label":"編集時は変更点と維持点を明確に"}]},"right_column":{"box_title":"良いプロンプト例","image":"{argument name=\"example image subject\" default=\"white mug on a wooden desk\"}"}},{"number":2,"title":"結果をよくするための段階的な修正","cards":{"count":4,"items":[{"icon":"sun","label":"明るさを調整"},{"icon":"palette","label":"色味を調整"},{"icon":"landscape","label":"背景を調整"},{"icon":"crop","label":"構図を維持"}]},"bottom_banner":"lightbulb icon with text"},{"number":3,"title":"少し踏み込んだ使い方","list":{"count":3,"items":[{"icon":"multiple images","label":"複数画像の活用"},{"icon":"text 'Te'","label":"画像内テキスト"},{"icon":"pie chart","label":"インフォグラフィック・図解"}]},"example_box":{"title":"テキスト指定の例","graphic":"green box with 'SPRING SALE'"}},{"number":4,"title":"追加の注意点","items":{"count":4,"items":[{"icon":"person","label":"実在人物の生成"},{"icon":"shield","label":"ブランド・作品名の使用"},{"icon":"id card","label":"クレジット表記"},{"icon":"checklist","label":"ポリシー遵守"}]}}],"footer":{"style":"dark blue banner","text":"{argument name=\"footer summary\" default=\"まとめ: 目的と制約を具体的に伝え、段階的に修正を重ねることで、より良い画像を生成できます。\"}"}}}

items.title: 4-Column AI Image Generation Infographic
items.description: Generates a structured, 4-column infographic with a header, bulleted lists with icons, and a footer containing examples and a workflow diagram.
items.prompt: { "type": "infographic", "style": "clean, corporate, flat design, soft pastel colors, rounded corners, white background", "header": { "main_title": "{argument name=\"main title\" default=\"ChatGPTで画像を作るコツ\"}", "subtitle": "{argument name=\"subtitle\" default=\"良いプロンプトの書き方と、効果的な修正方法（2026年4月10日公開の要点）\"}", "top_right_badge": "OpenAI Academy / Creating images with ChatGPT" }, "layout": { "columns": [ { "color_theme": "blue", "header": "{argument name=\"column 1 title\" default=\"1 良いプロンプトの書き方 (1〜3文で簡潔に)\"}", "item_count": 5, "icons": ["target", "landscape picture", "map pin", "paintbrush", "sliders"] }, { "color_theme": "green", "header": "{argument name=\"column 2 title\" default=\"2 結果をよくする修正のコツ\"}", "item_count": 4, "icons": ["checkmark", "checkmark", "checkmark", "A/B comparison"] }, { "color_theme": "orange", "header": "3 少し高度な使い方", "item_count": 4, "icons": ["multiple images", "letter T", "bar chart", "magic wand"] }, { "color_theme": "purple", "header": "4 注意点", "item_count": 4, "icons": ["shield with check", "star", "document with check", "gavel"] } ], "footer": { "left_section": { "title": "{argument name=\"bottom left title\" default=\"プロンプト例 (1〜3文)\"}", "item_count": 3, "thumbnails": ["orange tabby cat", "coffee cup on white background", "blue bar chart"] }, "right_section": { "title": "ワークフロー", "step_count": 4, "icons": ["upload arrow", "sparkles", "A/B boxes", "checkmark"], "flow_style": "horizontal with dashed arrows" } } } }

items.title: Professional workstation screen prompt
items.description: A prompt for generating a realistic depiction of a professional workspace screen, used to demonstrate GPT-Image 2's capabilities in rendering text and objects.
items.prompt: average {argument name="profession" default="engineer"}'s screen

items.title: 3D Abstract Data Pipeline Visualization
items.description: Generates a clean, minimalist 3D render of a sequential data processing pipeline using glass panels and geometric patterns.
items.prompt: A clean, minimalist 3D render visualizing a {argument name="concept" default="neural network data processing pipeline"}. On the left, a single white cable with a glowing {argument name="accent color" default="blue"} tip splits into multiple thin, sweeping white strands. These strands feed into a linear sequence of exactly 10 transparent, glass-like rectangular panels standing upright on a {argument name="environment" default="sterile white stepped surface"}. Each glass panel illustrates a different stage of transformation using geometric patterns in white and {argument name="accent color" default="blue"}. From left to right, the panels feature: floating dashes, a 3x3 grid of concentric circles, a dense dot matrix, scattered white pixel blocks, horizontal dashed lines, a fine mesh grid, and finally 3D cubic structures. The lighting is bright, soft, and high-key, creating a pristine corporate tech aesthetic with a shallow depth of field that gently blurs the furthest panels.

items.title: Cyberpunk Anime Character in Neon Tub
items.description: Generates a vibrant, anime-style cyberpunk illustration of a cybernetically enhanced character in a glowing high-tech pool.
items.prompt: A highly detailed anime-style digital illustration of a cyberpunk female character relaxing in a circular metallic tub filled with swirling, luminous blue water that sparkles with digital neon particles. She has spiky {argument name="hair color" default="blue and purple"} hair, {argument name="eye color" default="glowing blue"} eyes, and intricate cybernetic implants with glowing cables and neon nodes attached to her neck and the side of her head. A subtle grid pattern is visible on her cheek. She is looking over her shoulder while {argument name="activity" default="smoking a cigarette"}, with a thin, glowing trail of smoke rising into the air. The background features a dark, high-tech wall illuminated by glowing {argument name="background color scheme" default="blue and purple"} circuit board patterns, emphasizing a vibrant cyberpunk aesthetic with intense neon lighting.

items.title: Authentic Magazine Spread Photography
items.description: Creates an amateur-style iPhone photo of an open magazine featuring a specific article topic with sharp focus and authentic lighting.
items.prompt: Amateur phone photo of an open magazine spread across two pages, featuring an article about {argument name="topic" default="GPT Image 2"}. Shot on iPhone. No depth of field, everything sharp, authentic photo. Shot on iPhone. Main camera.

items.title: Humorous Temple Signboard with Goofy Monk
items.description: Generates a photograph of a goofy monk standing next to a 9-panel wooden signboard featuring humorous illustrated teachings.

items.title: F1 Race Results Infographic Dashboard
items.description: Generates a highly detailed, dark-themed sports broadcast infographic displaying race winners, podium finishers, highlights, and current standings.

items.title: F1 Race Results Infographic
items.description: A detailed Formula 1 race results infographic featuring a track map, illustrated podium finishers, and comprehensive statistical tables.

items.title: Anime VTuber Live Stream Overlay
items.description: Generates an anime-style illustration of a VTuber streaming with UI overlays like LIVE badges and a chat box.
items.prompt: An anime-style illustration of a cute {argument name="animal type" default="tanuki"}-girl VTuber streaming live. She has dark skin, short white bob hair, fluffy brown animal ears, large brown eyes, and a fluffy striped tail. She is smiling happily with her mouth open and waving at the camera with her left hand. She is wearing a black and white maid outfit with frilly white trim, a white apron with a light green waistband, and a green ribbon choker with a golden bell. The background is a cozy, softly lit room with bokeh effects, featuring a glowing pink neon heart on the wall. To her left is a professional black studio microphone on a stand, and behind it is a computer monitor displaying a pink chat interface. A small {argument name="plushie type" default="tanuki plushie"} sits on the desk next to the microphone. The image features a streaming UI overlay with 3 distinct components: a red badge in the top left reading "{argument name="top left badge" default="LIVE"}", a pink badge in the top right reading "{argument name="top right badge" default="ON AIR"}" with a heart icon, and a semi-transparent dark grey chat box in the bottom left containing exactly 3 messages. The first message has a green heart and the text "Cute!", the second has a green heart and the text "Warm~!", and the third says "{argument name="chat message" default="Love"}" with two green hearts.
items.authorName: しーげっちは自分で描いた絵を動かしたい

items.title: Poster Style Anime Character
items.description: A clean and direct prompt for generating anime characters in a stylized poster art format.
items.prompt: {argument name="style" default="poster-style"} {argument name="subject" default="anime character"}

items.title: Glossy Anime Shading Transformation
items.description: Transforms a flat-colored character reference into a highly rendered, glossy anime illustration with dramatic lighting and a solid background.
items.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the base, transform the flat coloring into a {argument name="rendering style" default="highly detailed, glossy anime illustration style"}. Apply deep shading, dramatic lighting, and bright specular highlights, particularly on the character's skin, hair, and tail. Enhance the clothing folds and give metallic accents a realistic sheen. Change the background to {argument name="background color" default="solid black"}.
items.authorName: しーげっちは自分で描いた絵を動かしたい

items.title: Flat Color to Rendered Anime Shading
items.description: Transforms a flat-colored 2D character reference into a fully shaded and rendered anime illustration with a solid background.
items.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0, transform the flat-colored character into a {argument name="art style" default="fully rendered, high-quality anime illustration"}. Apply detailed {argument name="lighting effect" default="shading, glossy highlights, and depth"} to the skin, hair, eyes, clothing, and tail to give the 2D design a polished, three-dimensional feel. Add a metallic sheen to the buckles and jewelry. Change the background to {argument name="background color" default="solid black"}. Preserve the character's original design, outfit, and neutral pose exactly as they appear in the reference.
items.authorName: しーげっちは自分で描いた絵を動かしたい

items.title: Music Video Production Storyboard Blueprint
items.description: A comprehensive production design document featuring character turnarounds, floor plans, storyboards, and lighting references for a music video scene.

items.title: Intense Elderly DJ Volcano Poster
items.description: Generates an over-the-top, fiery illustration of elderly people aggressively DJing in front of an erupting volcano, perfect for humorous album covers or event posters.
items.prompt: A hyper-realistic, intense, over-the-top illustration of three elderly people in a fiery, apocalyptic setting. In the foreground, two elderly DJs are intensely scratching on detailed turntables while screaming aggressively. On the left is an elderly woman with {argument name="woman's hair color" default="purple"} hair in a top bun. On the right is an elderly man with {argument name="man's hair style" default="spiky blonde punk hair"} and sunglasses. Between them in the background is a massive erupting {argument name="background element" default="volcano"} surrounded by roaring flames, flying sparks, and smoke. Looming at the top center of the image is a third elderly man with white hair and a beard, wearing a purple hoodie with the word "{argument name="hoodie text" default="KAMI"}" faintly visible, shouting with his hands raised making two-finger gestures against a backdrop of dark stormy clouds. Across the center of the image, hovering in front of the volcano, is large, jagged, neon graffiti-style text reading "{argument name="main text" default="DJBBA"}" in vibrant blue, green, and pink colors. The overall lighting is dramatic, illuminated by the intense orange and yellow glow of the fire.

items.title: Sci-Fi Cat on Fish-Powered Vacuum
items.description: Generates a surreal, cinematic sci-fi illustration of a cat riding a modified robot vacuum with fish rockets in space, featuring customizable text.
items.prompt: A surreal, highly detailed sci-fi digital illustration of a white cat with bright yellow eyes sitting on a black and silver robot vacuum cleaner flying through outer space. The cat has a metallic, ribbed cybernetic hose attached to the back of its neck. The robot vacuum is flanked by exactly 2 large, realistic fish acting as rocket boosters, with bright orange flames shooting out of their tails. The background is a vibrant cosmic scene with a starry nebula, streaks of light indicating warp speed, and a fiery exploding planet in the upper left corner. Large vertical Japanese text on the right side reads {argument name="vertical text" default="ネコと和解せよ"} in yellow and white. At the bottom center, large metallic 3D text reads {argument name="main title" default="GERONEKO"}, with smaller white text below it reading {argument name="subtitle" default="Creator of the planet"}. Cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic, humorous sci-fi concept art.

items.title: Handwritten Japanese Study Notes with Photograph
items.description: Generates a photorealistic top-down view of an open notebook filled with detailed Japanese study notes, doodles, and a printed family photograph resting on the pages.

items.title: Complex AI Model Infographic Board
items.description: Generates a highly dense, futuristic infographic board detailing the features, comparisons, and rumors of a next-generation AI model.

items.title: Complex Tech Speculation Infographic
items.description: Generates a highly dense, mind-map style infographic detailing speculative features, comparisons, and use cases for an AI model.

items.title: Anime Fantasy Castle at Night
items.description: Generates a detailed anime-style background illustration of a fantasy castle complex illuminated at night, perfect for visual novels or RPG environments.
items.prompt: A high-quality {argument name="art style" default="anime background art"} illustration of a sprawling fantasy castle complex at {argument name="time of day" default="night"}. The sky is deep blue, filled with sparkling stars and a {argument name="celestial object" default="large full moon"} positioned in the upper left. The architecture consists of light gray stone walls, featuring exactly 8 prominent cylindrical towers with {argument name="roof color" default="blue"} conical roofs, and a main rectangular building with a matching pitched roof. {argument name="window light color" default="warm yellow"} light warmly illuminates the windows, creating a striking contrast against the cool night palette. Elevated stone walkways bridge the gaps between the towers. The central courtyard is paved with neat stone tiles, featuring a single small white cube resting mysteriously in the middle. The fortress is nestled within dense, dark green forests, with rolling mountain silhouettes fading into the distant background.

items.title: 3D Red Bird Listening with Human Ear
items.description: Generates a 3D animated-style bird character with surreal human-like features listening closely, useful for humorous reaction images.
items.prompt: A high-quality 3D CGI render of a {argument name="character type" default="round, fluffy red bird character resembling Red from Angry Birds"} with thick black angry eyebrows, large eyes, a yellow beak, and a lighter belly. The character features a surreal addition of a {argument name="surreal feature 1" default="large, fleshy human-like ear"} on the side of its head, and a {argument name="surreal feature 2" default="red, human-like hand"} cupping the ear in a gesture of listening intently. The lighting is soft and cinematic, highlighting the detailed fur and skin textures against a {argument name="background color" default="pure white"} background.

items.title: Pub Scene Amateur Snapshot
items.description: A Czech language prompt for a natural snapshot of an elderly couple in a pub, used to showcase realistic human generation in GPT Image 2.
items.prompt: Amateur photo of {argument name="subjects" default="an elderly couple"} sitting in a {argument name="location" default="Yorkshire pub"}, amateur composition, snapshot.

items.title: Anime Cat-Girl in Realistic Alpine Meadow
items.description: Generates a 2.5D illustration of an anthropomorphic anime character sitting in a highly detailed, photorealistic nature landscape.
items.prompt: A cute anthropomorphic cat-girl with white fur, {argument name="hair color" default="short green hair"}, a prominent ahoge, and large {argument name="eye color" default="green"} anime eyes. She has fluffy green cat ears and a long white tail. She is wearing a loose, oversized {argument name="outfit" default="green off-the-shoulder tunic"} and sitting peacefully on the ground with her legs tucked to the side and paws resting gently in front of her. The setting is a lush {argument name="setting" default="alpine meadow filled with small white and yellow wildflowers"}. In the background, there is a sweeping valley, pine forests, and majestic snow-capped mountains under a bright blue sky with fluffy clouds. The art style blends an anime character design with a highly realistic, {argument name="style" default="photographic landscape"} featuring bright, natural sunlight.

items.title: 3D Anime Visual Novel Game Cover
items.description: Generates a 3D anime-style promotional image of four schoolgirls in a classroom with a customizable game logo.
items.prompt: A 3D anime-style illustration of four high school girls in a Japanese classroom bathed in {argument name="lighting" default="warm afternoon sunlight"}. In the foreground on the right, a girl with {argument name="foreground right character hair" default="long coral-brown hair in a ponytail with a white bow"} and green eyes reaches her hand out towards the viewer with a warm smile. In the foreground on the left, a girl with {argument name="foreground left character hair" default="short pink hair with red hairclips"} and pink eyes stands with her arms crossed, looking slightly annoyed. In the midground, a girl with long dark purple hair stands calmly holding a book, while in the background, a girl with short coral-pink hair and a red bow waves cheerfully. All four girls wear matching school uniforms consisting of {argument name="uniform style" default="grey blazers, brown sweater vests, red ribbons, and blue pleated skirts"}. The classroom features wooden floors, desks, and a green chalkboard. In the top left corner, there is a circular logo with a pink border containing the stylized text "{argument name="logo text" default="DOKI DOKI Literature Club!"}" and a large pink "3D" below it, decorated with a green pencil and a pink heart. The image has a high-quality 3D render aesthetic, resembling video game promotional art with soft lighting and depth of field.

items.title: Visual Novel Screenshot Mockup
items.description: Generates a fake visual novel screenshot featuring anime characters, a custom logo, and a dialogue box.
items.prompt: A visual novel screenshot of an anime-style classroom scene featuring exactly four high school girls in matching uniforms consisting of grey blazers, white shirts, red ribbons, and blue skirts. On the far left, a girl with short coral hair and a red bow looks excited with clenched fists. Next to her, a girl with long dark purple hair holds a red book with a gentle smile. Beside her, a girl with short pink pigtails and a red hairclip stands with crossed arms looking slightly grumpy. On the far right, a girl with long brown hair in a ponytail and a large white bow leans forward on a desk, smiling and talking. The classroom features a window on the right, a bulletin board on the left, and a foreground desk holding exactly three items: a notebook, a pink book, and a pen. On the back wall is a single poster reading {argument name="poster text" default="Just Monika. ♥"}. In the top left corner is a circular pastel logo reading {argument name="game title" default="Doki Doki Literature Club!"} decorated with a green pencil and a pink heart. At the bottom of the screen is a pink polka-dot visual novel dialogue box. The name tag reads {argument name="speaker name" default="Monika"} and the main dialogue text reads {argument name="dialogue text" default="'Welcome to the Literature Club!' 'It's a pleasure to meet you all!' ♥"}. Below the dialogue is a menu row reading 'History Skip Auto Save Load Settings'.

items.title: Amateur Apple Store Photography
items.description: A prompt designed to recreate the look of a casual smartphone photo taken outside a closed storefront, specifically focusing on reflections and visibility through glass windows.
items.prompt: Amateur photo in front of a closed {argument name="store" default="Apple Store"}, but we see through the windows. Shot on {argument name="device" default="iPhone"}. {argument name="lens" default="Main camera"}

items.title: Surreal Action RPG Boss Fight UI
items.description: Generates a highly detailed video game UI mockup featuring a battle against a bizarre, surreal boss monster with customizable text and elements.

items.title: Realistic Handwritten Study Notes
items.description: Generates a realistic photo of an open notebook with messy, casual handwriting in ballpoint pen under natural daylight.
items.prompt: A realistic photo of an open dotted notebook lying flat, filled with dense handwritten notes in {argument name="ink color" default="blue"} ballpoint pen. The handwriting is casual and slightly messy, like study notes, natural imperfections, crossed out words, underlined headings. Shot from slightly above, natural daylight from a window, no flash. {argument name="setting" default="Casual desk setting"}, shot on iPhone.

items.title: Cinematic Portrait with Blind Shadows
items.description: Generates a photorealistic portrait of a seated subject with dramatic lighting and distinct shadows cast by window blinds.
items.prompt: A photorealistic, cinematic portrait of a young East Asian woman sitting on a dark chair. She has shoulder-length bob hair with straight bangs colored {argument name="hair color" default="teal"}. She is wearing a {argument name="top clothing" default="navy blue tank top"} and {argument name="bottom clothing" default="light beige linen shorts"}. She is leaning slightly forward with her hands resting near her knees, looking directly at the camera with a {argument name="expression" default="neutral, calm"} expression. The scene features {argument name="lighting style" default="dramatic shadows from venetian blinds"}, casting distinct horizontal stripes of warm, golden light across her face, body, and the plain warm-toned wall behind her. A window with closed blinds is visible on the right side of the frame. High contrast, moody atmosphere, highly detailed.

items.title: Cat with Toy Car at Go-Kart Track
items.description: Generates a realistic photograph of a cat interacting with a miniature car at an outdoor racing track.
items.prompt: A realistic photograph of a {argument name="cat color" default="black"} cat standing on its hind legs, with its front paws resting on the {argument name="seat color" default="red"} seat of a small, white toy convertible car. The scene takes place at an outdoor go-kart track with asphalt, white painted lines, and orange-and-white striped track barriers. Above the cat and car is a teal canopy structure featuring a blue sign that reads "{argument name="sign text" default="* Go! Cart"}" in red and yellow lettering, next to a checkered flag graphic. The background is softly blurred, showing trees, blue fencing, and another distant kart, captured in natural daylight.

items.title: Elderly Man and Marmot Portrait
items.description: A photorealistic portrait of an elderly man in a suit posing next to a large marmot in a rustic garden setting.
items.prompt: A photorealistic portrait of an {argument name="man description" default="elderly Asian man with thin wire-rimmed glasses"} wearing a {argument name="man attire" default="black double-breasted suit with a white shirt and black tie"}. He has a gentle, warm smile and is standing closely next to a {argument name="animal" default="large fluffy marmot"}. The animal is standing upright, resting its front paws on a textured wooden log. The background features a {argument name="setting" default="rustic outdoor garden with blank wooden signs, a vintage lantern on a post, lush greenery, and small colorful flowers"}. The image features {argument name="lighting and style" default="soft natural lighting, high-quality photographic details, and a shallow depth of field creating a smooth bokeh effect in the background"}.

items.title: Trompe L'oeil Sketchbook Drawing
items.description: Generates a hyper-realistic optical illusion of a hand drawing a detailed pencil sketch in a notebook, complete with drawing tools.
items.prompt: A hyper-realistic trompe l'oeil image of a spiral-bound sketchbook resting on a wooden surface. On the sketchbook page is a highly detailed graphite pencil drawing of a {argument name="subject description" default="young Asian woman with straight dark hair and bangs"}, looking down thoughtfully as she holds a {argument name="object held" default="Rubik's cube"} in both hands. From the bottom right, a photorealistic human hand holding a wooden pencil enters the frame, appearing to actively draw the sketch. Resting on the top left corner of the textured paper are 1 rectangular white eraser, 1 small blue metal pencil sharpener, and scattered pencil shavings. The transition between the photorealistic hand and the graphite sketch creates a seamless optical illusion.

items.title: Y2K Retro-Tech Youth Portrait
items.description: Generates a vibrant, wide-angle fashion portrait of two young adults holding smartphones in a nostalgic Y2K aesthetic.
items.prompt: A vibrant, high-contrast Y2K fashion photography shot of two young East Asian adults. In the foreground, a young woman smiles softly at the camera, wearing a {argument name="female headwear" default="fuzzy pink bucket hat"}, a pastel patchwork crop top, a white pleated mini skirt, and a beaded necklace, while holding a white smartphone. Her long dark hair is blowing slightly. Behind her to the right, a young man laughs excitedly with his mouth open, wearing a {argument name="male headwear" default="backward orange baseball cap"}, a bright blue windbreaker over a green t-shirt, light khaki pants, and a silver chain. He is holding two black smartphones, one in each hand, with one raised high in the air. The image features bright flash lighting, a slight wide-angle lens distortion, and a smooth gradient background transitioning from {argument name="background color" default="hot pink"} to white.

items.title: Y2K Teen Magazine Studio Portrait
items.description: Generates a nostalgic, soft-focus studio portrait of two young adults posing back-to-back with smartphones, perfect for retro fashion or tech lifestyle imagery.
items.prompt: A studio portrait of two young East Asian adults standing back-to-back against a {argument name="background color" default="bright pink to white gradient"} backdrop. The photo features a {argument name="photography style" default="Y2K nostalgic 90s teen magazine aesthetic with soft focus, film grain, and a glowing bloom effect"}. On the left, a young woman with long dark hair smiles gently at the camera. She wears a layered outfit featuring a {argument name="woman's outfit" default="light green graphic t-shirt over pink long sleeves, a short skirt, and chunky sneakers"}, and holds a smartphone in her hand. On the right, a young man with short dark hair looks {argument name="man's expression" default="excited with his mouth open"}, raising one fist in the air. He wears a {argument name="man's outfit" default="baggy purple t-shirt with yellow trim, loose blue jeans, and a silver chain necklace"}, and also holds a smartphone. The camera angle is slightly high, looking down at the subjects.

items.title: Anime Art Process Infographic
items.description: Generates a comprehensive step-by-step digital art tutorial sheet with process thumbnails, color swatches, and detailed focus crops.

items.title: Website Homepage Screenshot Generation
items.description: A prompt designed to test text rendering by generating a realistic screenshot of a specific website's homepage.
items.prompt: Screenshot of the {argument name="website" default="Yahoo"} homepage.

items.title: Cinematic Boxing Match Poster
items.description: Generates a gritty, high-contrast promotional poster for a fictional boxing match, featuring customizable fighters, taglines, and event details.
items.prompt: A gritty, cinematic boxing promotional poster featuring a face-to-face staredown between {argument name="fighter 1" default="Mike Tyson"} on the left and {argument name="fighter 2" default="Sam Altman"} on the right. The left fighter is an older, bald man with a tribal facial tattoo, wearing a black boxing glove with "TYSON" printed on it. The right fighter is a younger man with dark wavy hair, wearing a black boxing glove featuring the OpenAI logo and text. Both men have intense, serious expressions, with highly detailed skin textures and sweat. The background is an out-of-focus boxing ring under bright stadium lights. The poster has a vintage, slightly scratched grunge texture. At the top, text reads "WORLD TECH vs BOXING CHAMPIONSHIP" in white and "{argument name="top tagline" default="NO CODE. ALL CHAOS."}" in red. In the center, large bold typography reads "MIKE TYSON" in red, "★ VS ★" in red, and "SAM ALTMAN" in large cream-white letters. Below this, text reads "{argument name="middle tagline" default="THE BRAWN. THE BRAIN. THE FUTURE."}". At the bottom, 3 columns of text display "{argument name="event date" default="SAT JULY 26"}", "LIVE ON PAY-PER-VIEW" in red, and "AT&T STADIUM ARLINGTON, TX". The very bottom footer reads "PRESENTED BY NETFLIX | TESLA | OPENAI".

items.title: Video Streaming Platform Homepage UI
items.description: Generates a detailed mockup of a video streaming website homepage, featuring a sidebar, category tags, and a grid of video thumbnails with titles and metadata.
